reviews.text: He does a great job with his clients. The bad reviews on here obviously are fake. He's a great attorney.
This is above and beyond professional and very experienced and knowledgeable attorneys.

I would give 0 stars if possible. Martin charged me $1000 for a consultation in 2018, did not tell me I could be receiving free legal assistance from U of M as a student, and once I found out I could have free legal assistance since I was a student, he refused to give any of the money back even though he did not help me at all. His office is located in the center of downtown Ann Arbor. The two possibilities — for him  to not have known this information that students receive free legal assistance or for him to have withheld this information  on purpose — are both bad. I feel like he took advantage of me and I do not recommend Martin E. Blank AKA Marty to anyone.

Mr Crawford is the best he walked me through everything and was polite and knowledgeable and answered all my questions.
If you need a lawyer I recommend Mr Crawforth.
Mr Crawforth provides excellent representation and a vast amount of knowledge.
Staff is polite, professional, and thorough.
Won me a huge disability case after the state initially denied my claim. Great work.
He is an incredible lawyer: smart, kind with clients, tough with opponents.  Totally trustworthy.

I have not had such a rude encounter with an individual in a long time.  It took 4 days to reach William Crawforth  by phone. And even then, my request was not to reach him by phone but rather to make an appointment for face to face discussion. Once I was able to reach him by phone, the man refused to consider my simple request to meet in person.  And instead insisted I answer his own questions. I was not even given a chance to explain my reasoning to meet face to face.  I am deaf and a phone conversation is a challenge.

Thank you for the response below.  You refused to answer my own question. I understand you feel it is a waste of time for you to meet with someone that struggles with phone conversation due to a disability.
reviews.ownerResponse: Unfortunately, Mr. Mount refused to answer my questions so that I could evaluate his problem.

reviews.text: Awesome lawyer
He among  the most knowledgeable, honest and hardworking attorney I know.  Smart!

Very professional, effective communication, and confidant attitude in resolving the matter which was successfully retained; competitive prices. I do find myself in varying legal situations at times, spending quite a bit of time finding aggressive attorneys. I would would recommend the firm to friends and family. I paid a $1,500 retainer and they eventually returned about 20% due to reduced work relating a traffic violations in 2017/2018. I possibly have an  outstanding traffic violation and unsure it taken care off —but would definitely would retain in the future.

It's hard to find a good attorney. Previously had charges dropped with another attorney, but overall good experience. They have a several areas of practice so maybe with good relationship they'd  consider looking into and persuing unclosed legal issues and affairs becuase I have —and have not had attorneys express interest in legal matters with substantial merit and I really liked the background of this firm.

Shawn O'Conner has been my attorney for the past 3 years. He has done a wonderful job defending myself and my adolescence. He has stayed in communication, giving sound legal advice, and has worked very hard in my case giving the positive out come it needed.

A very good law firm that was quick to respond to our issue.  Brendan answered all our quesrions and put us at ease during a difficult time.  He stayed on top of things. I am going to make sure I recommend this law firm to others.
A very good law firm.  Brendan was very helpful and especially quick to respond.  He answered all of our questions and stayed on top of things.  I would highly recommend.

I highly recommend using the staff is very friendly yet professional and took care of my issue in no time for a very fair price just used recently and I honestly have zero complaints was more then satisfied in the results if I ever get into any type of trouble or find myself in a tight spot for some reason this will definitely be the place I go to for help

Having never had a legal issue before, I felt very lost when I ran into legal issues over a misunderstanding. Brendon was extremely understanding, and was able to take care of my case in no time! You couldn't find someone better than Brendon to have on your side!
Very professional and helpful  - would highly recommend

Let me first state that all of the gentlemen in the this office are great attorneys and even better persons.  I have spoken with all of them on an one on one basis and you will be hard pressed to find a group of more consulate professionals working in the same office.  With that being said, Shawn O' Connor has been my attorney for three years now and has represented me in a number of legal matters. He has offered impeccable legal advice on all of the aformentioned matters.  I have always been pleased with the results of his work and will continue to use and trust his services and abilities for the forseeable future.
Shawn O'Connor represented my husband in a criminal case, he did a wonderful job and got the outcome we wanted.  Would highly recommend!

Amazing Attorney's! Shawn and Tim worked my case and I was extremely pleased with the outcome.  I referred many friends and family who were also very pleased. Shawn was very reassuring and made all of my stress go away. I am so thankful for all of their help!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so very much for the kind review. We are delighted to be of help.

reviews.text:
Over the past 5 years, or so, Brendon has represented me on many different occasions. He is an amazing attorney and I would reccomend him to any, and everyone. He is someone you can not only count on to help minimize a charge, but someone you can trust and he is a man who actually cares about you as a client, and not just the case alone. I have gotten to know Brendon very well over the past few years, and anyone who I know who ends up finding themselves with a deliemma with the law I refer them to him. I have met with other attorneys in the past but no one has helped me get myself on the right track and only going forward as Brendon has.
I would reccomend anyone associated in this law firm if you are looking for a great lawyer to help you in any case you are dealing with!
They care about YOU as a person, and want the best for YOU!

I was very happy with the services provided and the level of professionalism given. I will not hesitate to reach out for assistance again in the future if or when needed. I recommend Warren & Schairbaum to anyone that requires legal assistance
Thank you to the whole team. I finally was awarded my SSI.  I couldn't have done  this process on my own, you did a great job with all the paperwork and keeping me well informed.
Incredibly helpful and was with us every step of the way! Highly recommend them for anyone struggling through the social security process
Helped me get my disability benefits. Cannot recommend them enough. If you ain't rolling with Warren & Schairbaum, don't even bother appealing your case. - Larry Zavala
It was scary and nerve racking through out, but Warren & Schaibaum was there with me through out. We got the fully favorable decision....Thank you so much for being there, your the greatest!!!

Sarah is the absolute best she pushed through the almost 8yrs of red tape and won my DAC benefit for me I can’t imagine having a better lawyer than her to go through this journey with thank you from the bottom of my heart

This law firm is the truth! They worked quickly for me to receive my Social Security benefits, and have held my hand the whole entire time! Imagine how much of a relief it is to have a law firm that actually gives a dang about you! Highly recommended!

Sarah helped us navigate the complicated and often frustrating process of filing for, and obtaining Social Security Disability benefits for our daughter, and Sarah's guidance and counsel were instrumental in this long and tedious process.
Sarah's commitment to coordinating all aspects of our case, including working with medical professionals and therapists were crucial to the successful outcome of our case.  We absolutely would recommend Sarah Schairbaum to anyone else in a similar situation to ours.
They made the process very easy and not stressful. I would recommend them to others that need help with their claim
really excellent in all regards- thank you!

This law firm helped me sort thru complicated end of life issues. Bridgette was kind, compassionate and knowledgeable. She helped my husband and i to sort our wills and poa, and medical advocate paperwork and get it signed and distributed. I would highly recommend this law firm!!
Sarah is very informed on the subject matter and worked with us very well in meeting our needs.

Sara, Amy, and their team were absolutely supportive and responsive to our daughter's Disability/Medicare issues. While she won the case, they were also realistic about all the possible outcomes and the next steps. Highly recommend them.
I am a person who avoids the outside world. It's a long story. Warren & Schairbaum's staff where not only patient with me but provided an understanding I never knew. I'd recommend them to anyone!
Professional service. Sara and her team were very friendly and helpful. They were great to work with and we will be recommending them to our friends and family.
Skillful, caring, down to earth. Great staff. Helpful phone advice.
Attorneys who specialize in SSI and SSDI, my son was denied and they helped get through it and get him approved.  They did an excellent job.
I forgot to add my 5 stars!
Great Team. Good communication, good listening skills and warm atmosphere. Thank you Sarah Ryan Schairbaum, Amy and Dee
They were willing and able to help me when I needed it the most.  They will always have my gratitude.

Dave and his assistant are always so helpful and make any reason you are going there seamless.
My experience for seeking out their service  was very intimidating until they reassured me they could help and guided me through the process.
I recommend Shand Law!!!!!
Very rude and impatient not worth trying to talk to unless you got thousands to throw away
Professional. Knowledgeable.Fair. If you want answers and the willingness to assist you on an equitable basis. This is the lawyer for you.
David was able to help me figure out how to deal with my situation when other lawyers were putting me on wait lists. He gives it straight, but he knows his stuff
David offered us very helpful and valuable advice while navigating a settlement with a contractor to avoid going to court. Highly recommended.

David Shand is the most honest and straight shooting lawyer I have ever had the pleasure of knowing. Being able to trust a lawyer isnt usually what one might expect, but Mr. Shand's honesty is so refreshingly palpable that any previously held misgivings will melt away.

Dave and Julie really went to bat for me when needed. At times, I felt like there wasn't enough communication about how to proceed and what to expect, but, in the end, Shand law really did an incredible job negotiating an agreement for me. I realized they were the experts who could buffer the emotions involved. I can't stress enough how impressed I am with the outcome, the authenticity, and the understanding I received from Shand law. I definitely recommend 😊
Very Professional, And provided Solid advice from the "consultation" to the  "finalization" of my divorce. Worth every penny
Very Professional, Clearly told me what to expect, and what to complete to appeal for my drivers license restoration.+++++++++
Very thorough personable knowledgeable clean and appointment was right on time
No communication. Made several calls, no returns. Stopped by and still no return call. Might be a great attorney but it is difficult to find that out when he does nothing.

I use Matthew at Mitchell Law for all our design patent work in the US. Matthew is always prompt and efficient and offers great advice. Matthew is very professional and more than willing to offer guidance throughout the process. Matthew is highly recommended.
I could not be more impressed with this ip lawyer!  Very knowledgeable, great communication, and excellent value.  This is the guy to hire!

Matthew walked me through the trademark process from beginning to end and beyond. He is very professional, timely, and really cares about his clients. He is honest, knowledgeable, and always takes the time to explain things in terms I can understand! I'd give him 10 stars if I could! Highly recommend!
Kind, Courteous, and Prompt. Highly Recommend. 5 Stars 10/10

I was looking for a Patent Attorney because I was against a deadline to re-submit my application. I googled patent attorneys and Matthew Mitchell appeared in my search. I read his reviews and decided to move forward with Matthew. We had an initial phone consultation and I sent over my documents for him to review. Matthew responded promptly and with an estimate. I did not hesitate and paid Matthew promptly. We spoke again during the decision period from the USPTO and he told me we had a chance. Well today Matthew sent us some great news. We had been approved. Do yourself a favor and just retain Mr. Mitchells services. He is up front, answers his phone calls and emails promptly. He is truly about customer service and makes you feel like he cares and this is not just not another client or number.
Thank you again Matthew! You have a client for life.
outstanding attorney the best one in michigan
Most highly recommended. Mr Mitchell has pleasantly provided me with an exceptional and timely patent service at a highly competitve price.
Very helpful
Excellent friendly service, with great communication every step of the way.

Matthew made what was initially a confusing and somewhat challenging application process easy and fluid. He provided sound advice and was easy to work with during the application drafting stage. He also stayed in contact with me throughout my design application process and updated me as best as possible as to the status of my application. I am very pleased with his services and would definitely recommend his services to others going through this process!

My experience with Matthew has been very pleasant and efficient from the moment I contacted him to assist me with a Design Patent in July of 2013.  He answers emails promptly, and speaks in a language lay people understand!  I would highly recommend him without reservation!  He is personable, and kept his cool at times I didn't "waiting" for the patent process to end and be issued.  AND it issued today, so, Happy St. Patrick's Day to me!!!  Thank you Matthew!
You will be hearing from me whenever I have the need for your services!
Sincerely,
Jane Keeffe
Greensboro, NC

Matthew Mitchell:  A no nonsense, organized, easy-going professional with very reasonable rates compared to firms here in California.

I hired him last year to assist me with my design patent applications for the U.S. EU, China, Japan, Canada, and Brazil.

He coordinated with overseas law firms and except for a few minor items everything went very smoothly and all the applications were approved.
Matt Mitchell has helped me for years with many patent filings.  I highly recommend him.  He is very knowledgeable and delivers work on time.

Nuala is responsive, wise and patient. I ask a lot of questions and she kindly answers each one. She watches out for our nonprofit - making sure that necessary paperwork is filed. I was thrilled to learn that she is the lawyer for another wonderful nonprofit per my referral. I cannot recommend her enough! - Jennifer Rice, Sent With Love
Bob has been more then helpful helping with my mother in laws estate. Can't reccomend him enough. Goes above and beyond to be helpful.
Extremely helpful and very nice people

I was in a fender bender that caused damage to my only car and left me with injuries that made it hard to work. At first, I went to another law firm, and they told me I would get a settlement that was much lower than what I expected. Eventually I found Hughes Mathews Legal Group. They not only promised a much better settlement but also took the time to explain everything clearly. Throughout the process, they were very professional and always kept me updated. In the end, I got a much higher settlement than the first law firm had told me. I’m really glad I went with Hughes Mathews and would recommend them to anyone dealing with an accident.

I'm glad I worked with this attorney because she was very thoughtful and made sure I was kept informed throughout the whole process involving my car accident settlement. I had no clue all of the nuances involved and how difficult the insurance company can be. Thank you!

This law firm is the best one to go to if ever you are involved in a car accident and the insurance company doesn't want to act. This team of legal experts will take the best care of you. They always check up on you to make sure everything is going in the right direction along with reminding you about any follow-ups or doctor appointments. I'm glad I was referred to this firm and was treated like I'm family thank you again and I'm happy I got to work with you guys!

John handled my case very professionally and was able to win my complicated case. I had a personal injury case involving a car accident and I was referred to them through a family member and I had the best experience and the best outcome for my case. They made me very comfortable during an urgent case and provided useful medical contacts for my injuries. They sounded very familiar with personal injury cases and were able to answer most of my questions.

I cannot say enough about this law firm. I was in a rear end car accident and got injured. I am not the type of person that runs to a lawyer, so I tried to deal with the insurance company on my own. However, the insurance company gave me an extremely difficult time, whether it was about fixing my car or the way they attempted to downplay my injuries. I finally contacted this firm and things changed immediately. I loved the staff, they always kept me informed about my case. I received an excellent settlement and cannot stress enough how comfortable I was.
Excellent, the best!

After 18 years trying to connect with my Mother in the USA while I was overseas. We tried many lawyers to help with my case. Up until Ruby Robinson received my case. It was nothing but a blessing to work with Ruby Robinson. He was very communicative and made sure I did everything correct and am now finally connected to my mom. All thanks to Ruby for his continuous support.
MIRC was so helpful in my case back when the Trump ban happened. We were successful in getting my husband to the states. Thank you for all your hard work and time on my case.
Excellent service

one more I thank, your work especially to my lawyer Jaimie lerner whom never seen but just on the phone and e-mails I would really like to thank you and see you face to face, you are really great, I received my green card without any problem ,I really say thank you thank you thank you  and god bless you
This center has helped me again and again. These are great people doing great things and helping those who are in desperate need of a variety of services.

I have to put this about on here about this law firm and lawyer. Miss Parker is a lawyer that is not going to work for you. A friend of mine used her for her divorce. Miss Parker did not get any property that said she was get by the court.Miss Parker did not get child support or the to pay medical bills. Miss Parker made her give everything back. Also Miss Parker let her ex take her to court to many times, and charged her over 250k and asking only one question. Now she is asking for 50k more for doing nothing. If you need a lawyer find anyone else that is bet
reviews.ownerResponse: I have never represented Mr. Meadows and neither has my law firm.  Mr. Meadows is a friend of our former client.  He has only written this recent “review” as we seek our former client’s satisfaction of her contractual obligations to pay us for our services which we have patiently waited .   Further, this “review” is factually inaccurate.  This client received far more than 50% of the martial estate.  In fact, we successfully invaded the separate property of her former spouse, achieving a substantial monetary settlement.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Please note: Ms. Simko never posted a review until my law firm asked her to live up to her contractual obligations and pay for the services rendered.

We represented Ms. Simko in two separate actions, beginning in 2019, which lasted a few years. Our firm committed significant resources to pursuing her legal matters. Outside of that scope, we provided our personal assistance to her with her life challenges out of our good will. Through our hard work and diligence in her case, we were able to invade separate assets of her former spouse from which she received a significant sum of money – far beyond the value of the marital estate. We went above and beyond for our former client.

reviews.text: Penny has been nothing short of amazing! She has many years of experience and will steer you in the right direction. She really calms your nerves too.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to leave a review, Shelby! We are so glad you are happy with our services.

reviews.text:
Penny Parker represented me in reinforcing the judgement of divorce, my ex divorced me in 2015   I tried another lawyer but made no progress with that attorney, we just didn't click. I spoke to friends am/family and then poured though reviews of attorneys. I called several but when I saw the amazing reviews about Penny I called right away. I was able to speak with her briefly and had an appointment to tail.discuss in further detail, but I knew from that first call she was the one that I wanted to represent me. We spoke again at that appointment and she agreed to take on my case, that took a huge burden off my shoulders. Penny communicated with me throughout The case. I worked with her staff and her colleagues and they all had my best interest first.

Usually it's the guy asking for a divorce from his wife, but mine was the exact opposite. Penny seem to understand me and what I was going through and put looking out for my interests first. My case was complex reinforcing the judgment of divorce and there were many hurdles, I think most other attorneys would have quit. But Penny stayed with me through it all. She and her team at KGP lawyers worked collectively to overcome each of these complex obstacles that I faced in this divorce.
If I had to do it over again I would choose Penny and KGP lawyers without a doubt.
I have the utmost appreciation and respect for Mr cascus Mr Dad and Mrs Parker.
If a friend asked me for advice with any problem of family or property law I would refer them to KGP lawyers.
Penny Parker is a very professional, thorough, responsive, passionate & committed attorney. I highly recommend her.

The best! I have used her for the past 3 years on a very high conflict case and have been thrilled with my results. She took on my case after my first lawyer got sick and eventually passed away. I highly recommend her.
Penny Parker is an excellent family law attorney. She is passionate and detailed in her work. Highly recommend!

Ed Shaw completed our family's Living Trust as well as a liability waiver for our wedding last year.    He is very professional and did a great job on both.  Good communication through phone and email.   He also takes the UM law benefits plan.  No complaints at all :)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words.  It was a pleasure working with you.

reviews.text: I'm glad I came!!!
Ron randall

Weiner and Randall has the best succes rate for social security, workers compensation, facilitation and arbitration cases. They have great staff who are always available and willing to help. They also have two convenient locations in Bingham Farms and Howell. I would recommend them for your legal matters. You won't be disappointed.

Best law group in Bingham Farms! they replied quick to my messages
and helped me with my social security troubles!
No matter what oppossing council tried, he stopped them at every turn, snd in the end, I got more than I literally bargained for.

Mr. Dillon handled my parents' trust, but it would be better stated to say that he mishandled it. Communication with the beneficiaries was poor (dozens of phone calls and emails went unanswered), transparency was non-existent, everything took way longer than promised, which greatly decreased the value of certain assets, and there was no itemized bill nor were we provided a final accounting to show that monies held back for taxes and tax preparation were actually spent on those things. In general, I would say that the way the trust was handled made a difficult time in my family's life much more difficult than it needed to be.
Does not really have time to deal w client I believe spread to thin but starts case and then doesn’t finish
Great job with our LLC
Thank you to our clients  for helping us become one of the leading law firms in southeast Michigan over the past 26 years.
Ellis is the best attorney there is and one heck of a counselor and friend. Anyone who has ever worked there that I’ve dealt with has been a great listener and genuinely will fight for your rights.
They charged me $5000 without my authorization, I would stay away from this robbery firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: This dispute is regarding Mr. Marouani's wife retaining our firm to represent her in her divorce case against Mr. Marouani. The payment was made from a marital account on which she was an authorized user, as confirmed after investigation by the bank as well as Square.

reviews.text: Top notch!  Very happy with their services.
I highly recommend they listen and handle the issue
Mr Freatman knows his stuff!!!   Always on top of his game !  So happy I found him to represent us !
Friendly staff and professional services

Terribly unprofessional and rude
Very unprofessional they sent me a bill for $285.00 then they call me telling me my bill is $395.00 one of the charges was $67.00 for sending a form to represent me in court! I asked why such a high charge for 5 minutes of labor filling a form? She said we have to send someone to the court to drop it, so I guess I have to pay for a driver and gas money because this office doesn't use mail. I spoke to the lawyer he never bothered to check that they billed me incorrectly, my bill was 285.00 not 395.00! With a rude tone he tells me "I don't have time to waist with you I charge 395.00 per hour, pay my bill and you can call other lawyers."  After I told them I have the bill that you mailed me its 285.00 not 395.00 they said OK sorry just pay the bill we sent you . I will never deal with them again and this lawyer doesn't care about this profession! I am writing this so that others do not have to deal with the same issues I have experienced with this office. Everything I have stated is true, if the office feels I have stated anything incorrect they are able to respond to my review.
I recommend attorney Christina Rivera, at Roberts and Freatman. She is knowledgable in family law, criminal law, as well as landlord tenant.  She cares about her clients and works hard.
JRB handled my very messy divorce. I don't know what I would have done without them. John and his law clerk Tammy truly care about their clients.

Attorney that will take your money but NOT do any work to help and represent you. Then says you need to get new counsel after doing NOTHING! You don’t get your money back which seems to me to be robbery! Dragged his feet with custody issues and definitely does NOT put his client first! Families are being torn apart and the children are caught in the middle with zero help from this attorney that supposed to be by your side to help you through the process. DEFINITELY would NOT recommend and save yourself the wasted time and money!

unethical shouldnt even be allowed to practice law he actually held my settlement check from my divorce refused to release it unless i paid him an amount he pulled out of thin air .even called opposing council to have them put a stop payment on my settlement check so he could take control of the money and extort payment hire anyone else oh and in an ugly contested divorce this man didnt even do a discovery just went with opposing councils financial disclosure offered me the opportuniity to rehire him and file for bankruptcy for my marital debt in mediation where my ex got all her debt covered hire anyone else ! all facts all true !

John Bailey changed the way i viewed Lawyers,  I can truly say I trust him wholeheartedly.
What hes prcven to me, he has the Loyalty, and witts of Harvey specter,  with honorable morals, and a big heart to boot.
Hes literally the whole package.
Hes has pulled me out of hard times, and i came out ahead. When my mother was going through a divorce, He proved to me more than anything, he had her back,  and truly cared about his wallet.  I respect him, and would, and HAVE referred him to my closest friends and loved ones.
His determination to fight to WIN for his clients, goes well above and beyond any lawyer ive known. He tells you like it is, without pulling punches, to prepare you for the battle. You can trust hes got your back.  Trust me his opponents wont know what hit em.
Thank you John, for everything.

John Bailey was recommended to my by a friend and I'm so glad I took her recommendation. Not only is he knowledgeable and respected in the community, but he's easily accessible for questions, concerns, and updates. I've always been able to trust him and have felt that he actually cares about me and the outcome of my case rather than how much he can profit.

Robert elmen is one of a kind. When you look into his eyes and speak to him you see a true warm inviting kind caring person who does not wait around to get to work. Robert jumps right into it! He saw what I was being put up against and Mr elmen communicated thoroughly between me and The local PD shutting down what charges could have been brought forth after nothing was founded & making it known I have back up ready to fight in the name of defense! If ever in the future I am in need of legal assistance I wouldn't think twice than to call Robert elmen of elmen legal PLLC. Absolutely the first one that comes to mind knowing Ill have someone true caring and willing to fight for me and my family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind and thoughtful feedback. Every case is important, but it’s the people behind those cases that truly matter. It was a privilege to be your advocate, and I’m proud we were able to navigate this together.

reviews.text:
This man is one of the few lawyers I've dealt with that has demonstrated genuine & productive empathy.

I was held on no bond for a serious charge and my brother reached out to Mr. Elmen. He came to visit same day, took notes & asked great questions, assured me I wasn't a bad person & that he knew how to help. Only lawyer that has offered to file a motion to help get me out of custody sooner. Incredible guy.

Only spoke with him for about 30 minutes, but it got me through a hard time. Thank you again, Robert.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share this. I truly appreciated working with you and helping you navigate a situation that can be stressful and unfamiliar. I’m glad I could provide steady guidance and be someone you felt comfortable turning to throughout the process.

reviews.text:
Attorney Elmen is truly one of a kind. I reached out to him on behalf of my nephew, who was facing serious charges and also battling mental health and addiction challenges. From the moment we spoke, Mr. Elmen showed genuine care, professionalism, and an incredible level of compassion. He didn’t just handle the case—he helped guide my nephew through one of the hardest times in his life.

What stood out most was that Mr. Elmen truly listened and cared. He treated my nephew like a human being, not just another case file. My nephew’s parents and I were amazed at how patient, kind, and understanding he was throughout the entire process.

If you want an attorney who works tirelessly on your behalf, who stands by you when others might not, and who genuinely wants to see people get a second chance—Attorney Elmen is the one to call. He’s not in it for the money; he’s in it to serve, to help, and to make a difference. A true blessing and a man of integrity.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind and thoughtful feedback. Every case is important, but it’s the people behind those cases that truly matter. It was a privilege to be an advocate, and I’m proud we were able to navigate this together.

reviews.text: I retained Robert Elmen as my attorney for a misdemeanor I was charged with in Washtenaw Co. Mr. Elmen not only made the entire process seem very easy and comfortable, but he was able to have the charge reduced to a parking violation with a small fine. On top of that I received no points on my driving record and have no criminal record. I recommend this attorney in the highest possible regard.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to leave your review. I'm so glad I could be of help, and I’m always here if you or someone you know needs support moving forward.

reviews.text: I was very impressed by Mr Elmen when he helped my friend recently with a legal matter in Washtenaw circuit court. Mr. Elmen was extremely empathetic and understanding of my friend and the case, yet in court he could really put the hammer down when it mattered. He mastered all the nuances of my friend’s case and had a really good knowledge of all the issues at hand.  He gave the case and my friend the utmost concern and attention. I highly recommend him!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to leave your review. I'm so glad I could be of help, and I’m always here if you or someone you know needs support moving forward.

reviews.text: Needing help with a difficult government situation.  I retained Mr Elmen and have only the highest praise for his absolute quality services.  He successfully accomplished the resolution to my dilemma, may God bless him.  Have no worries, if you need a quality attorney,  call Mr Elmen.
reviews.ownerResponse: I’m grateful for the chance to have supported you, and your thoughtful review truly resonates with me. Working with someone as cooperative and trusting as you made the process smooth and effective. Thank you for being such a wonderful client, and please don’t hesitate to reach out again, even if it’s just to check in.

reviews.text:
I met Robert in early February 2024, when I hired him to represent me while I faced misdemeanor charges in a Michigan case. I found his contact information via internet search. He promptly replied to my email inquiry to say that he would be happy to represent me. His fee was modest and included all services prior to trial. The case involved several pretrial hearings over four months. He completely and competently answered all of my questions. He listened actively to my account of the inciting incident. His understanding and trust in me was apparent throughout my work with him.

He advocated on my behalf in conversations with the prosecuting attorney. Robert believed that the charge should be reduced from a criminal misdemeanor to a civil infraction (like a speeding ticket). Despite my worries and fears that the charge would not be reduced, Robert reassured me that it likely would, and, in the end, the charge indeed was reduced to a civil infraction. I am exceptionally pleased with this outcome.

We resolved the case without a trial. I will pay a $130 fine and lose two points on my driving record, but this is a negligible concern in light of the charge that I faced initially.

I have very limited experience in working with other attorneys, so I can't really compare him to others. However, I can say that Robert was professional, competent, and kind. His work met and exceeded my expectations. His regular reassurances to me provided great comfort in what could have been a nerve-wracking four-month experience.

I highly recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review. Working with you was a rewarding experience. Your trust gave me the ability to do my job fully, and I’m grateful we were able to reach a resolution you can feel good about.

reviews.text: Attorney Robert Elmen is fantastic. Very calm, professional attorney who will try his very best for you. Would hire him again. :)

I was fighting a case that would have given me a life sentence, and this man saw i wasn't guilty even though I was arrested for it anyhow. Needless to say I never saw a day in court. Thank you Mr elmen, your a Godsend to the ThornFamily

First, Before I reached out to Attorney Elmen by phone from California to address 10 17 year old forgery charges, I had searched google and attempted to reach out to 3 other attorneys in the area, all who told me that they either had no interest in taking my case, were too busy, or just seemed like they didn’t care. Attorney Elmen was different. He listened to my story, he understood that people make mistakes, especially when they’re young. He was straight up with me from the start about the possible negative outcomes of the case but also gave me hope that we had a fighting chance of getting all 10 of my charges dismissed. Attorney Elmen went to work in and out of the courtroom on my behalf. Meeting with the prosecutor on numerous occasions to discuss my circumstances, answering my phone calls and/or expediently returning my calls to give updates. Ultimately, the charges were ALL DISMISSED. All 10!

Although, Attorney Elmen required a deposit, he worked with me for payments and I felt that he trusted me truly. Hopefully I never have to get an attorney again, but if I do, it will be Attorney Robert Elmen.

This was my first time ever being involved in any type of court case. Throughout the process Mr. Elmen kept me aware of every possibility in my case. One thing that struck me a certain way was the way he  also showed he actually cared about what was going on in my case. There are lots of attorneys that are just in it for the money but Mr. Elmen showed that this was not the case with him. He was genuine, was always an ear to listen to me whenever i would have any concerns and most of all he is dedicated to his work and your case. I could have definitely done some time in the county jail. However, with his hard work and dedication i am still able to be at home with my family while on probation. And for that Mr. Robert Elmen, i can never repay you. Thank you for all you have done. My family and I are forever grateful. I do not just consider you my attorney, i will forever think of you as a friend.
Robert was very nice and helpful through the whole process. I was looking at jail time, but got off with just a small fine. Totally worth it!
This guy delivered!

Robert represented me in a case where I was accused of an (Assault and Battery) in Ottawa county Michigan. The prosecution was very forceful and intimidating and even threatening to increase my charges. We took it to jury trial and won. My life was allowed to move forward and I am sure without Roberts help I would have been wrongfully convicted and suffered huge life altering consequences. The whole legal process I was forced to go through was highly uncomfortable and very upsetting, Robert helped me get through this and keep peace of mind. Some attorneys are in it for the money and the title Mr. Elmen cares about the people he represents, I will never forget what he did for me!

As a technology entrepreneur, I have found Young Basile Hanlon & MacFarlane to be one of the best firms for my growing company Warmilu. They took our original provisional patent filings, helped update and revise it to clarify key points, and have been a perfectly balanced and complimentary partner and foundation for our subsequent US utility patent filing and foreign utility patent filings in Canada, the European Union, and India.

I have found our particular attorney, Craig Redinger, to be absolutely brilliant and attentive. He and Dawn and Rita and the other team members meet all of our needs and questions, often answering the same day whether we email or call. In addition, they gave us the most flexible of payment schedules for our drafting, filing, and patent prosecution. They send us absolutely helpful reminders for our payment schedule and let us propose a 6-month payment schedule that would work for us, a startup.

We also continue to be blown away by their cheer and support for us as we grow. They were some of the first to congratulate us when I was a finalist for the Forbes 30 Under 30. In addition, they cheered us on as we pitched at various competitions and pursued our institutional sales. I find that they are consistently supporting Warmilu and cheering us on as we hit key commercial milestones. The team brings a degree of business acumen and strategic insight that helps them stand head and shoulders above other intellectual property firms.

We are grateful for Young Basile Hanlon & MacFarlane for being local (just a quick, brisk walk away) in Ann Arbor and helping us build up our patent portfolio.

Awful. This lawyer thinks he’s above the law trying to settle with a blind individual after they got caught shutting her heat and electricity for 9 days. This is pure despicable. I hope other people see through your lies and find a different attorney.

Just witnessed this lawyer justifying turning power off on a vision impaired individual.  He thinks he's above the law and his clients don't have to follow Michigan disconnect laws.  The only thing that should be in escrow is his bar license.  Don't waste time or money on him.  If you are going opposite of him... he's so technically inept that he might just miss your hearing too!  Once his lip quivers, you know that you're winning!

Let me help you Mr. Drukis... it is illegal for landlords to shutoff ANY utilities to tenants behind on rent.  The person that you are representing may now have to prove that the wiring is up to code (now that it a central part of a legal dispute).  They may also have to provide who shut the power off and show that they were certified in the state of Michigan to be conducting live activities in a dwelling that was inhabited at the time.  If... someone was to send a letter to the court for further consideration.  That would be true justice.

Jackie Garris is an exceptional attorney, and I cannot recommend her highly enough. She represented me in my driver’s license restoration case with the Secretary of State. I had previously been granted a restricted license, and this case was to restore my full driving privileges.

My first experience with a different attorney for the initial hearing was long, stressful, and overly complicated. Jackie was the complete opposite. She took on my complex case with confidence and ease, making the entire process feel manageable and straightforward. She went above and beyond—advising my substance use evaluator on necessary corrections, carefully reviewing and organizing all of my documentation before submission, and even sorting through a massive Google Drive I shared with her to identify the most relevant documents.

Jackie took a genuine interest in helping me succeed, and thanks to her diligence and expertise, I won my case and have my full license back. A huge bonus: she participates in MetLife Legal Plans, which I have through my employer—so the entire cost of my case was covered.

If you are looking for a knowledgeable, compassionate, and highly effective attorney to represent you, do not hesitate to contact Jackie Garris. She is truly outstanding at what she does.

reviews.text:
I'm really confused as to how this firm as so many stellar reviews. I booked an appointment directly on their website and paid a $25 consultation fee. I received booking confirmation and reminders, and when I showed up to the call, no one came.

I sent emails twice during the call to try and find out where the consulting attorney was, and no one answered. I sent another email afterward expressing deep concern that this felt potentially below board, and again, no response. In that email, I also mentioned that if no one replied to confirm they were refunding my payment, I would file a dispute.

Trying to give them the benefit of the doubt one last time, I called! When the woman answered the phone I asked, "is this the Ann Arbor firm location?," to which she replied, "are you trying to reach the Trademark Lawyer Firm?" I said yes, and she said, "then yes, you've reached the right place, and we do have an office in Ann Arbor." I'm guessing this was NOT the Ann Arbor firm, but rather just a call center.

Alas, no one was available to take my concern, and she stated someone would need to get back with me. At this point, I said I'd just go ahead and report the charge as I've spent far too much time on this, and I'm not waiting around for a call that probably will never come (based on the absolutely abysmal email communication... or should I say: LACK of communication).

The most shocking part is... this is a law firm?! Arguably one of the most professional, reputable types of businesses that exist?

They might do good work (if they even exist?! I'm seriously questioning it at this point!) based on all of the reviews but... at the very least, I do not **I repeat DO NOT** recommend booking a Calendly consultation and paying the fee unless you enjoy wasting money and time!

**UPDATED**

Erin from the firm contacted me to say it was a horrible series of events that led to everything that happened. She refunded my payment and offered a complimentary consult to make up for what happened (which... given the situation, I politely declined, but I appreciated the offer). I've updated the review from 1 to 3 stars to reflect this – I'd still be wary to pay to book a consult with this firm, but I do genuinely believe it was mostly crappy circumstances.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Adriane,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience, and please accept our sincerest apologies for the frustration and inconvenience you’ve encountered. We completely understand how upsetting it must have been to prepare for a scheduled consultation only to be met with silence — that is absolutely not the standard of service we strive to uphold.

I attempted to reach you by phone within an hour of receiving your message this morning; unfortunately, your voicemail isn’t set up, so I was unable to leave a message.

While technical or scheduling errors can occasionally occur, the lack of follow-up and delay in response you experienced is inexcusable. Once we realized that your emails had been caught in our spam filters, we immediately processed a full refund of your $25 consultation fee.

That said, this situation falls far short of the professionalism we expect from ourselves and our systems.

To clarify, while we do utilize a virtual receptionist service to help efficiently route calls, we are a fully operational law firm with a real team and physical office presence. Still, your perception and experience matter deeply, and it’s clear we failed to meet expectations in this instance.

We also extended an offer to reschedule your consultation, for free — the link was included in my last email. If you choose not to move forward, we completely understand and respect your decision.

We truly appreciate you holding us accountable and hope there may be an opportunity in the future to restore your trust.

Sincerely,


Erin

Cody went out of his way to come meet with us in person on multiple occasions to help speed up the process, knowing that we were juggling a lot of emotions, and needing to physically be in the hospital for days on end.

Cody's preparation helped save many headaches because of the knowledge and guidance he was able to provide leading up to the date of her passing.

I would highly recommend reaching out to Cody in order to get estate planning in check.  He taught me that it is never to early to start thinking about it.  It is difficult to understand all the nuances, and having someone who has the knowledge there to help answer your questions, offer guidance, and be by your side through some incredibly tough times is invaluable.  Cody was just that for us.

It unfortunate that I'm having to write this review but buyer beware.  Some of the lawyers here are short and difficult to work with.  or don't work with you at all.  Randy Barker seems to have a short temper.

I'm surprised to see any positive reviews. I'm not sure why they have good ratings. They couldn’t bother to reply to my email requesting service. Tried a couple time and got rebuffed. Take your legal support business somewhere else. Rude.
Not sure why they have good ratings. They couldn’t bother to reply to my email requesting service. Tried twice and got ignored. Rude.

I was referred to Mr. Demopoulos after firing my divorce attorney.  Mr. Demopoulos put me at ease right away and conducted himself with class and integrity throughout the two year process. As an attorney myself, I have sent clients and teamed up with this office because I know the expertise they bring to the table. This is an incredible firm that is caring, compassionate and have the experience, skill and legal precision to get right to the heart of your matter.

Highly recommend! Greg handled cases for both my son and I and was very attentive to our cases and achieved the outcomes we had hoped for quickly and efficiently. He is dependable, detail-oriented and gave our cases 100%. Would definitely hire him again in the future.

Facing divorce, I was referred to Greg Demopolis by a friend. Not knowing what to expect, I was immediately put at ease at our first meeting.  Greg was very professional and knowledgeable. He was extremely patient with me and helped me throughly understand the entire process. From start to finish, he was with me every step of the way. Always available and very prompt.
I would highly recommend Greg and have referred him to many friends.
Always treated with professionalism, providing excellent counsel for over 25 years to my family .

I utilized Mr. Demopoulos' services for my divorce. He was very professional, knowledgeable and easy to contact during the entire process. I have reached out to him for legal advice on other unrelated manners and he is always very helpful. I would whole hearted refer him(and have) to others.

Greg was amazing, came in after an other attorney gave me no help for a long time and guided me through the most difficult parenting case. Was always responsive and gave great counsel. Definitely had my best interests at heart and fought for me every step of the way .

Greg Demopoulos is a very knowledgeable, experienced, professional, responsive and patient attorney.  He takes the time to explain your options and course of action.  I am very grateful for his help in securing the return of my security deposit in a landlord/tenant dispute. I highly recommend Greg for any type of legal issue.
Mr. Demopoulos represented me and was very professional and helpful. He has a high success rate and was able to help me win my hearing. I highly recommend.

Jay is an absolutely adept attorney and we could not have been happier with his counsel. We hired Jay to represent us in a dispute with our landlord where we felt like we were being taken advantage and wrongfully being blamed for issues that were not our doing. From a simple first email and phone conversation, Jay clearly understood that there was no legal basis for our landlord’s claims. Jay went above and beyond and handled all tough conversations with the landlord and his representative patiently. He kept us informed of the progress constantly, advocated for our mental well-being, de-stressed the situation for us, and never wavered from doing the absolute best for us. His advise helped us get out of a toxic living situation into a better place. Finally, when the landlord insisted to withhold all our security deposit to pay for damages we did not cause and other irrelevant things, Jay filed a motion in court to get us what we rightfully deserved. He stood up to the landlord’s attorneys and made them realize that there was no legal bases for all their claims. In the end, we got a vert nice settlement that made up for all the troubles. Without Jay on our side, we would have undergone a lot more mental anguish and our Landlord would have forced us to pay for things we were not responsible. We highly recommend Jay to anybody out there seeking a advocate who stands for a client’s best interests. Thank you Jay!

I recommend using Arbor Law PLLC for your civil matter.  The attorney worked really hard.
Even when there was no hope, they made multiple court appearancs, and he pulled off a miracle.
Jay was able to get us results quickly.  I did not have to waste excessive time or energy knowing the matter was handled.

Consulted with Jay on some possible legal trouble, and was happy he was so easy to talk to.  I'm definitely going to him first on any future issues!! He doesn't talk over your head, which I truly appreciate!!

I understand that not every case can move forward, but if someone pays for a consultation and is told they will receive a follow-up call, basic follow-through should be expected.

Mr. David Nacht and his team are on top of their game!!   Attention to the client was something noticeable when I met with him.   He asked the questions to have a complete understanding of the situation.  I can’t compete with big business financially,  he knew that and got the case dismissed rather quickly.

reviews.text:
My experience with NachtLaw, P.C. was entirely negative.

I contacted NachtLaw, P.C. on the basis of a personal recommendation.

I told my life story, more or less, to someone on the phone who was not even a paralegal.

I was emailed by that person saying that an attorney from NachtLaw, P.C. would consult with me for a given period of time, for a given fee.

I called to begin that that consultation for that fee.  I was told by NachtLaw, P.C.'s representative that this was "all a mix-up" and that I had no opportunity for consultation, for any time and at any fee.

A pure waste of my time, relatively, I'm afraid!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Connor, we are very sorry to hear that you feel you had an unpleasant experience.  We take review ratings very seriously and set high standards for ourselves, we’re sorry to hear this was not met in your interaction with us. Based on the notes in our records, you were advised that our attorneys were unable to assist you with your particular matter.  We understand how important it is to find the right support, and we encourage you to continue your search for an attorney who specializes your area of law.

reviews.ownerResponse:
The individual in question was never a client of my firm. I run a specialized practice highly concentrated in domestic relations cases such as divorce, child custody and related matters. There are many areas of the law that I do not practice. Relevant portions of the Code of Professional Conduct prohibit lawyers from accepting cases in areas of the law that are not familiar to them.
I have therefore instructed my staff to let prospective callers know the limits of my practice areas.
I am familiar with this situation. Per my protocol, this individual was informed repeatedly that his case was not within my practice area, and that he should speak with another firm.

reviews.ownerResponse:
My entire office was disappointed to read the unfavorable review recently posted by Mr. Lazar Mansour on April 2, 2024. Divorce work is difficult and we work very hard to provide accurate advice and counsel in very trying situations. I am pleased that Mr. Mansour was satisfied with the outcome of his divorce case. I am very familiar with the lawyer he hired to replace me. I have great professional respect for his new lawyer and her firm. Unfortunately, the content of Lazar Mansour's review is misleading, incomplete and inaccurate. I bear Mr. Mansour no animosity and I wish him well going forward. Nonetheless, I must set the record straight by responding to his review.

My office was retained by Lazar Mansour in 2022 to initiate divorce proceedings. Per standard protocol, discovery, mediation and motion practice was undertaken. Lazar Mansour is an educated, intelligent man who has out earned his wife significantly throughout his twenty year marriage. Public filings in this case indicate that he was married for over twenty years. His wife earned little income during this time period, and remained out of the work force to care for children over significant periods of time. As a professional, I am obliged to provide accurate advice based on my best understanding of the law as it applies to the facts of a given case.

Mr. Mansour was of the firm opinion that he would not pay alimony, and that he should be awarded sole physical custody of the parties’ children. It was my opinion that Mr. Lazar Mansour was likely to be ordered to pay alimony, child support, and that he was not likely to be awarded sole physical custody.

I took no particular joy in advising Mr. Mansour of my opinion. Alimony is common in cases of long term marriage where one party has much more income than the other party. Nonetheless, I did advise him that alimony was highly likely and that equal parenting time was his best case scenario. In response, Mr. Mansour expressed the opinion that I was working for his wife's interest, and not his interests. I let him know that this was not the case, and that it might be best to hire a new lawyer.

Lazar Mansour reports that his new attorney achieved an "amazing outcome" in his divorce case. I have no doubt that replacement counsel did a very thorough job on his behalf. I reviewed the public record to familiarize myself with the outcome of his case. The online register of actions maintained by the court contains his divorce judgment, his child support order and his alimony order. The contents of these documents show that Mr. Mansour received results very similar to what I told him: Mr. Mansour was ordered to pay alimony, child support and he received equal parenting time with the parties' children.

Lazar Mansour claims that I demanded $20,000 in attorney fees from him. In fact, this did not occur. I did advise him that he was likely to incur a very large bill for legal services if he did not resolve his case on terms that were more realistic than his demands. It was my intention to resolve this case inexpensively and quickly. My review of the record shows that this did not occur, which is regrettable. My services were terminated in early February of 2023. The public record shows that this case went to arbitration which resulted in final judgment on February 16, 2024. Undoubtedly, this case was quite expensive insofar as it continued for over one year after my departure. I take no pride in saying that "I told ya so" but in fact I did "tell him so" and I have proof.

In conclusion, I stand behind the advice I gave and the representation I provided. I hope this response adequately explains my actions.

reviews.ownerResponse:
I was disappointed to review the content of the Google review submitted by Ms. Audrey Young. Unfortunately, I was not surprised. I have been representing members of Audrey Young’s family for over 20 years. I have been hired by her family many times and they have been very pleased with the work I have done on their behalf. The termination of the attorney client relationship between Ms. Young and me came about at my insistence. I promptly refunded a portion of Ms. Young’s retainer upon termination. In order to properly represent a client, effective communication is necessary. Frank and honest advice must be given and received. Regrettably, communication was poor between Ms. Young and me. For this reason, new counsel was necessary for Ms. Young. I stand behind my decision to discontinue as her attorney. The content of her review is misleading and inaccurate. I take my professional reputation very seriously. The majority of my reviews are quite positive. In reading Ms. Young’s review, the following must be pointed out to the public. Ms. Young was often abrasive and rude. She hung up the phone on me during an important conversation. Ms. Young sent me a digital communication with a middle finger emoji. Ms. Young’s mother apologized to me for the manner in which her daughter spoke to me.

Contrary to the content of her review, I was available to Ms. Young. She was given my personal cell phone number for calls and text message communication. Ms. Young was also given my email address. Many documents, recordings, and videos were provided, reviewed, and integrated into paperwork and responses filed on behalf of Ms. Young.

Ms. Young’s email contains no criticism of the work I performed on her behalf nor should it. The representation I provided to her was insightful, helpful, and very high quality. I will not share the content of professional discussions between myself and Ms. Young. The public record in her case will show that my filings identified important issues regarding her initial status as sole legal custodian and important points regarding Michigan’s law on acknowledgment of paternity paperwork.

I was personally asked my opinion regarding the professional reputation of Ms. Young’s replacement counsel whom I wholeheartedly endorsed. I provided replacement counsel with my cell phone number and went out of my way to communicate detailed and important information regarding this case so that the transfer effectuated smoothly and efficiently.

Ms. Young’s review seems to indicate that her entire case has been settled. This is not consistent with my review of the public online Register of Actions. In conclusion, I was asked by both Ms. Young and her mother to remain as counsel of record. I did not demand an additional retainer fee. I did inform Ms. Young that the contested nature of her case would make an additional retainer fee necessary in the future. I hope this response explains why I chose to inform Ms. Young that she should seek other counsel. In spite of our differences, I wish her well in life and in this case going forward. I hold her family in high regard. If further actions are necessary on my behalf to help out her interests in this litigation, I will eagerly perform these tasks as necessary.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Noble had a very difficult case. His misconduct made it impossible for me to represent him. As a result, things went from bad to worse.
Prior to hiring me, Mr. Noble attended a Wayne County Referee Hearing. At this Hearing before I was his attorney, Mr. Noble’s parenting time with his daughter was suspended. I was hired to appeal this suspension to the Circuit Court Judge assigned to his case.
At the Circuit Court Hearing, Mr. Noble screamed out loud at a seating Circuit Court Judge his opinion that the ongoing proceedings were “bullshit”. Mr. Noble was handcuffed and taken into custody by the Wayne County Sherriff Court Deputy. I was able to obtain Mr. Noble’s release from custody without formal contempt of court charges being initiated against him. I am convinced that if Mr. Noble had behaved appropriately, I would have obtained parenting time for him in spite of his behavior in Circuit Court and at Wayne County Friend of the Court. I have no personal animosity whatsoever toward Nick Noble and I wish him well. The poor results obtained in his case occurred because of his behavior. These results in no way resulted from a lack of diligence, effort, and preparedness on my part. His post is misleading and it should be taken down.

During this time, the only person who truly stood by me and fought for me was Mr. Simon. On the day of the court, this was the only thing on my mind, and for me, that was just as meaningful as winning the case itself.
I am grateful to him for standing by me, fighting for me, and reminding me that there are still people who believe in justice and doing the right thing even in the most difficult moments. I will never forget what he has done for me. We won my case, and I know he was just as happy as I was.

I'm very grateful I contacted Attorney Joseph Simon while our family was in the middle of a crisis we ultimately learned was an attempted scam. Joe quickly discovered that a "case number" given to us by a person impersonating a police officer who said he'd arrested a family member who'd  supposedly caused an accident and was injured, and people impersonating the public defender's office that wanted us to pay bail, was not a number used by police or the court system. Joe was able to confirm our family member was not in the legal "system." He suggested we reach out to our family member (who we assumed no longer had a phone) and within a short time we learned our family member was safe and at work. In the midst of our crisis, Joe provided valuable counsel that allowed us to navigate this terrible event. We highly suggest your family have a "safe word" to be used in the event of an emergency, so you can be confident you're actually speaking with your loved one.There are sophisticated, bad actors out there. If you need help on a criminal matter in Washtenaw County or other nearby counties in Michigan, call Joseph Simon.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Diana.  Your advice for a safe word is very sound.  These scams are getting more elaborate and sadly more frequent.

I hired this law firm thinking it would be a little bit of overkill considering the very solid reputation of each of the attorneys here and the fact that my charge was a minor misdemeanor that could easily be beaten. We sat with Mike Vincent the head honcho who gave us the whole speech about how much of a heavy hitter he was and how our case was going to be a walk in the park for them. Mike charged us FULL PRICE for the case which we agreed to as we were assured that Mike would be there to represent us and keep us worry free. After the day we cut the check we didn’t hear from them one time until two weeks before my scheduled hearing. Obviously thinking this was something to be concerned with we called the office up to see what was going on and the receptionist seemed startled at the fact that we were calling to get some information rather than going into the hearing totally blind. After leaving us on hold for 5 minutes she returned to the phone very flustered and informed us that a different attorney who did not even work for the firm would be representing me. Come to find out this attorney had JUST RECENTLY graduated law school (University of Michigan) . My case was so minor compared to the cases they typically handle, that the firm just brushed it off, took our check and LITERALLY forgot about it as Mike had scheduled himself to represent someone else on the day he was scheduled to represent me. Long story short we paid for the heavy hitters and were given a rookie lawyer who fumbled the case and our money straight into the drain. DO NOT LET THEM DO THIS TO YOU IF YOU SO CHOOSE TO HIRE THIS FIRM

reviews.text:
Brandon Hewitt is not a very good attorney in comparison to the countless attorneys I’ve worked with.

Do you realize how hard it is to encourage someone to seek an attorney when they’ve never done it? Incredibly. I work with multiple attorneys every single day. I am a referring provider for hundreds of MVA cases.

My mother got into a terrible car accident where her car was split in half and she had a terrible TBI. Because she is out of state we unfortunately referred her to this firm as a way to make it easier for her given her TBI.

Brandon did a terrible job of communicating with my mom the importance of her seeking out TBI screening. I had to tell him that it’s a good idea to get her in for a screening. I have not taken the BAR exam, why is it that I understood the importance of this?

Fast forward my mom got in a biking accident and Brandon dropped her case because it wasn’t an easy giant settlement for him. I call that being inept, along with the rest of your performance. You’re simply not very good at this. You cherry pick easy cases and drop those that become a challenge for you.

You also gave my mother, whom has a life altering brain injury no alternative referrals or suggestions. You were lazy.

Go with any other firm than this. And there are many better firms in other states with attorneys able to handle far more complex cases in Michigan. It was my mistake for trusting a Michigan firm in handling themselves. There are also centers in other states attorneys can refer to but Brandon didn’t even know where to get a functional neurological screening. I had to send her.

You created this issue through a lack of communication, forethought and dedication to good work and I expect it made right.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Both you and your mother have always had my personal cell phone for access and communication, as evidenced by the voicemail you left me filled with expletives and threats to “hammer” me with bad reviews. We take our commitment to providing extraordinary service seriously and we’ve provided personal attention and updates to your mother at every stage.

Our firm has conducted a thorough review of your mother’s case and provided honest assessments throughout. You raised her subsequent bike accident in your own review. We cannot respond here with what we told your mother or you about this, nor can we discuss her injuries. Unfortunately, all we can say here is not every case can proceed under Michigan law, which requires the need to prove specific causation.

Our firm is committed to helping people with professionalism and care, as we did with your mother’s case, and as evidenced that your review is such an outlier from the vast majority of reviews from the clients of our firm.

We wish your mother the very best moving forward.

Sincerely,
Brandon Hewitt

Noah, I continue to pray for you and your staff.  May God continue to bless you and give you effective, creative ways for total victory.  Thank you all again and always!

Because of their perseverance and commitment, we achieved a successful settlement. I am truly grateful for the hard work, integrity, and patience shown to me and to everyone involved in this case.

reviews.text:
Super beneficial ! Jason looks out for us riders!
Knowledgeable and passionate ! Thank you
Jason sponsored the Motorcycle Accident Scene Management class I took at BMW of Detroit. I appreciated that!

Jason generously sponsored a part of the fees for our Accident Scene Management course at the Moose Lodge in Ypsilanti, which already showed his commitment to the biker community.

He also joined us for a live Q&A session and shared essential “must-knows” for Michigan riders - from no-fault basics to more complex legal questions. He handled a wide range of audience questions with clarity and patience.

What really stood out to me is that he is a biker himself, so his advice felt practical, knowledgeable, and grounded in real experience 🏍️!

If you are a Michigan rider and ever need legal support after an accident, Jason is a great resource and he also has a trusted network of affiliate motorcycle lawyers across the country.

I highly recommend attorney Jason Waechter if you are in an motorcycle or car accident. Jason took very good care of me after a truck pulled out in front of me while I was riding my motorcycle. He has won millions of dollars for his clients, so don't hesitate to call if you're looking for a 5 star lawyer! Jason Waechter has your back.

Suzanne took over my cousins estate in  2020, I have yet to hear anything on the estates assets and what exactly was split between the other inheritor and I. It has been 2 years that I have not heard from her. I have sent emails and text messages and called. NO response. The house papers were never filed to put my cousins house in my name and I have lived here now for 4 years, I have sent emails asking for help to fix it and resend the papers. I still have not heard anything. In the beginning I took care of canceling all credit cards, the house insurance and much more that should not have had to do. she is not very respectful in a matter of getting back to anyone or even giving updates to the family. too much to list and this is still ongoing, and me not knowing what is going on.

reviews.text:
I recently worked with Ms. Leimback on a child support modification case, and the entire experience exceeded my expectations. She had not represented me during my original divorce in NJ or a prior adjustment to parenting time, so this was my first time working with her. From the very beginning, she was highly attentive—taking the time to thoroughly understand my history and listen carefully to my current circumstances. She not only explained the options available for the new filing but also advocated to address and correct areas from earlier proceedings that hadn’t been handled as well as they could have been. She managed the filings efficiently and kept me informed at every step of the process, so I never once felt left in the dark.

What stood out most was how approachable and easy she was to work with. I always felt like she truly cared about my case and my family, and she never left me wondering what was happening—she kept me updated at every step. She was incredibly approachable and easy to work with, which made the situation much more manageable. Ms. Leimback always made herself available to answer questions, and when challenges came up, she explained things clearly and calmly, which gave me a great deal of peace of mind during what could have been a stressful time. Her professionalism and attention to detail made me feel confident that my case was in good hands.

Most importantly, I truly felt well represented. She advocated for me with both skill and compassion, making sure my voice was heard, and my interests were protected. Ms. Leimback's professionalism, empathy, and dedication made all the difference, and I will always be grateful for the peace of mind she gave me during this time. Child support and custody issues can be overwhelming, but her steady guidance made the process feel manageable. I wish I would've used her services for previous filings. Her professionalism and genuine care gave me confidence every step of the way, turning what could have been an overwhelming process into one where I felt fully supported. She is not only an excellent attorney but also an advocate. I’m very grateful for her dedication and would not hesitate to recommend her to anyone needing help with child support or other family law matters.
She has helped me on two separate occasions, both times everything was taken care of professionally and quickly. Will definitely use again if need be!

I am very happy with my experience working with Kelly, from the first phone call all the way through to the closing of my case.  Very thorough, answered every question, helped and kept me updated through the entire process.  Would highly recommend.

reviews.text:
I've known and worked with Dan Geherin for over 20 years.  I was a major case detective for 20 of my 25 years in law enforcement and I had several cases where Dan represented the defendants.  Dan is an exceptionally talented and hard working attorney and I always had to bring my "A"-game to court since I always knew Dan was bringing his.

One of the characteristics which makes for an exceptional criminal defense attorney is the ability for the defense attorney to establish relationships and rapport with members of local law enforcement.  Establishing those relationships helps to build trust and understanding which is oftentimes extremely beneficial to the client.  Dan has those relationships.  I've seen Dan personally work what I considered miracles for several of his clients based upon his keen knowledge of the law, and his established relationships with law enforcement and the courts.

Aside from his work ethic and legal prowess, Dan's a compassionate and genuinely nice guy.  If I were ever in trouble and needed a good, reliable defense attorney, Dan Geherin would be at the top of my list.  I'd trust him with my freedom.
