reviews.text: Adrienne Logeman is an exceptional auto injury attorney.  No television commercials or attention seeking  Just word of mouth from years of professionalism and success in the court room.  Andrienne Logeman has represented me in a auto personal injury case for more than ten years.  My accident was in 2004 and in 2011 my auto carrier began denying every medical bill presented to them which were then paid by my health insurance carrier.  Since 2011,  Adrienne has been kind enough to file suit every two to three years to reimburse my health insurance carrier for bills they paid that should have been the responsibility of my auto carrier.  In 2019, my auto carrier decided to take the matter to a jury trial.  Adrienne put me at ease and explained every step of the process before and during the trial.  She was amazing.  Confident, composed, professional, polite and extremely competent.  Adrienne deposed two of my physicians and I was a live witness.  That was all she needed.  The insurance company deposed six independent medical examiners (physicians and psychologists) and had one live witness; the insurance adjuster.  The trial lasted three days.  There was a jury of seven people.  At the end of the trial the jury was instructed to consider six questions, including; was I injured in an auto accident, did that accident result in a brain injury and other injuries, should the insurance company pay for my ongoing treatments, should they pay for my related medications, and should we be awarded interest for bills they did not consider for payment in a timely manner, etc.  The jury returned a unanimous verdict in our favor on all questions.  I never felt nervous or worried.  Adrienne is a very knowledgeable and I let the professional do her job.  She made me feel very comfortable on the witness stand.  Watching her cross examine witnesses on video depositions and in person was an experience I will not forget.  I could not have asked for better representation and care.  She was accessible and her staff was always very helpful and friendly.  I would not let anyone else represent me in an auto case.  I am very thankful for her.  A great firm.  A great lawyer.  A great family.  An incredible experience.

I work with individuals that have suffered a brain injury because of an auto accident. This law practice has always been an amazing resource for them. They always put their clients first and I know that we can always trust their advice.

Jim Iafrate and his staff are wonderful to work with, professional, compassionate, and do everything in their power when working on your case.    I was always part of the process as communication was timely. Additionally, they know the law and will not be bullied by big insurance companies.    I truly believe you could not find a better firm to work with.

I was in 2 different catastrophic car accidents. Jim Iafrate has been my attorney for many years. I can say that without a doubt he is the best attorney in this field.  Jim and his staff are professional and compassionate. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for a attorney that has been in a car accident. Jim will go above and beyond for his clients.  I can not say enough about this firm they continue to advocate for me.

Cheryl Kirby is an absolute Angel. She has helped me when no one else would. She also is a great leader in supporting Brain injury support group. She is a wealth of information and has endless resources.I truly don't know how a lot of us with TBI would manage without her constant support and survival techniques. I am grateful for her being a valuable liaison to Logeman Lawyers who so graciously took on my case. Thank You for always being there for everyone and being available to help us trouble shoot. I highly recommend this law firm especially to those who have been in car accidents. What a blessing to us All. God Bless You and Logeman for going above the call of duty and caring for us.

Working with Bob and his staff was a God-send for us.  The auto insurance company had unilaterally decided no further treatment was warranted for a closed head injury of a pedestrian struck by an out-of-control driver.  The Logeman team helped us understand the process for  getting the insurance companies to fulfill their obligations; they filed legal papers, represented us well in case reviews and successfully mitigated repeated settlements that covered all medical expenses, replacement services and medical transportation as well as compensation for pain and suffering.  Hopefully we'll never face this type of need again, but if we do, we'd return to them in a snap!
Mr. Iafrate is very hands on and always responsive to questions.  I definitely recommend this law firm.
You guys did a great job

Through a third-party process, the case ultimately settled, and my son was to  receive the full refund he had originally requested for an apartment he was never able to move into.

During that hour, he carefully listened to all the details, thoroughly reviewed the paperwork we had received, and immediately identified discrepancies. He also caught language in the agreement that could have negatively impacted my son and successfully negotiated revisions — adding important stipulations that provided stronger protection moving forward.

When payment was delayed not once, but twice after the documents were signed, Andrew continued to follow up. His persistence and professionalism resulted in the opposing attorney personally delivering the check to my son’s new residence that same day.

Andrew went far beyond what was expected for a one-hour consultation. He was thorough, ethical, responsive, and genuinely committed to doing what was right. I would not hesitate to hire him again and highly recommend him to anyone in need of legal guidance.

I had an issue with a tenant and called Mr. Babnik, and he was so gracious to help me out over the phone. He gave me the statutes I needed and explained what I needed to do without ever having to come in or charging me. So I’m not officially a client, but wanted to say how great he was! THANK YOU!!!

We were embroiled in a complicated and emotionally fraught child support case, and our first lawyer was a dud who wasted thousands of dollars and did not advance our case in over two years.  Andrew Babnik came highly recommended, and switching to his office was like night and day.  It was such a relief to finally have an engaged professional communicating what would happen, how much it might cost, and what strategy would best get us where we wanted to be.  In only a few months he forged a settlement we could live with, using only a part of his retainer and returning the rest.  We would recommend him to anyone unequivocally.

The reviews don’t lie - so look no further. You need a lawyer with a confident, winning attitude that takes away the soul-crushing stress and anxiety surrounding your case.

Mine was a landlord/tenant matter, which Andrew specializes in. After only two consultations for advice and a document review, my months of agony were over and my case was resolved to my satisfaction.

He did not upsell me or waste my time. In fact he was very considerate of my circumstances and extremely patient with me. If I ever have another issue, I know exactly who I’m going to call. Let Andrew make things simple and easy for you - like a good lawyer should.

Andrew was amazing to work with! My divorce case was extremely unusual with my ex -husband basically ghosting Andrew and not helping by providing information in any way. In the end we ended up going into a default hearing since I did not want to go to court and Andrew put together a really strong case for me. The outcome was all I could have asked for and I am extremely grateful to Andrew! He definitely had my back the whole time and walked me through each step. Even with the case over he is still helping and reachable in case he needs to step in again. I know divorce is hard and very emotional time but Andrew made the process easier and can't thank him enough! I would highly recommend him.

I had a great experience working with this attorney on important family and future-planning legal matters. From the very beginning, he was responsive, clear, and dependable, which I especially appreciated given a tight timeline.

I was referred to him by another attorney who wasn’t able to meet the deadline, and he stepped in seamlessly and handled everything with efficiency and ease. He created an open, positive environment where I felt comfortable asking questions and having honest conversations throughout the process. His professionalism and approachability made what could have been a stressful situation feel manageable and well supported. I would highly recommend him!
Andrew was lots of help and went above and beyond. Highly recommended!

It was a great experience working with Andrew for my condo purchase.  I really appreciated his guidance and very responsive, friendly, and helpful approach. Working with Andrew made the process much easier for me.  I would definitely work with Andrew again!

Update - have worked with Andrew a couple times since my original post and he continues to be a wonderful resource - so responsive and helpful.  Thank you, Andrew!

Andrew was excellent to work with for our prenuptial agreement. He was flexible regarding communication and willing to meet in-person or via Zoom for convenience. He would provide guidance as my individual attorney in regard to my best interest, but was also receptive to the agreements and concessions made between us as a couple. Would definitely recommend!
Andrew helped us with our will and estate planning. He promptly responded to our emails, met with us to answer all our questions and ensured we covered everything important. Highly recommend him.
Andrew was extremely helpful as we navigated estate planning.
Andrew handled our estate planning and did it very efficiently and answered all our questions quickly. It made a stressful situation less so for my husband and I.

Attorney Babnik has been handling my Michigan real estate and trust legal needs since 2020. I have found him to be very knowledgeable and professional and would recommend his law office for these matters.

Fortunately, it’s not often one needs a divorce attorney, nor is it often planned.  Ours was not and I was truly blessed to have Andy recommended to represent me.  And I was even more fortunate that my husband eventually cancelled his filing.  But in the meantime, I had the opportunity to work with Andy and see how he approached the task.
The “success” of the process also depends on both lawyers, not just your own.  In my case, I clearly had the better of the two.  I’m sure both were competent about the law and the courts, and Andy was able to explain all of that in ways I could understand.   For me, I really wanted to have the proceedings handled in a way that was fair, amicable, and respectful of our 50 years together.  I sensed that if I needed him to be, Andy could be a tiger.  But he also listened, sensed what mattered to me, and was there to try to respect my wishes.  He offered me advice as appropriate, but where there were choices, he saw himself as there to represent what I wanted, both in tangible outcomes but also in emotional ones.
I also read his communications with my husband’s lawyer, and those were gracious and respectful as well (unlike my husband’s lawyer).
So I found in Andy a rare combination of talents.  I was fortunate to work with him, and you would be as well.
And if you don’t need a divorce attorney, Andy is also an Estate attorney.  I have not yet experienced those skills, but I would expect them to be equally masterful and kind.
Called and got a straightforward response as to my options. Saved me a bunch of time and money. Thank you!
Andrew is my go to recommendation for someone who needs family law or estate planning in Michigan.

Andrew assisted my husband and I with establishing wills, healthcare directives and a family trust. Andrew is extremely knowledgeable and answered every single question we had, no matter how small or detailed, which made us feel comfortable with all of the documents and process - anyone who has gone through this process can likely understand that at the start it seems extremely overwhelming and intimidating to think about. Andrew made the process much easier and very smooth. He was very responsive to all outreach, questions, etc., and I would highly recommend Andrew and his services for estate planning needs! Thank you so much Andrew!

I used Andrew for a family law case.  He listened to me and asked my goals on the case and worked hard to achieve those goals.  He was honest throughout the whole process and worked efficiently to close the case as quickly as possible and not incur any extra costs.
Andrew was fast, insightful, and saved me a lot of trouble. And he has a sense of humor, which goes a long way. Thank you, Andrew!
Andrew Babnik did a great job for me.  He listened to my needs, was kind, and came through as promised with professionalism.

We recently reached out to Andrew to help us get our deposit back on a new build construction contract.  He was recommended by a friend of a family member, and really exceeded our expectations from the very beginning.  In the initial conversation after we explained our situation, he was able to outline a plan moving forward with a reasonable all-inclusive fee for his services.  He was always very clear with what our next steps should be, a timeframe for updates, and what he saw the responses would be.  With his guidance, we were able to get out of the contract with a full refund of our deposit.  Without any reservations, I highly recommend Andrew.

Mr. Babnik was a pleasure to work with and knows his condo law. He had our problem resolved quickly and professionally, and it didn’t cost us an arm and a leg. I would recommend him to anyone needing help with condo law. He’s a very nice man.

Andrew is the lawyer you want on your side in court. He is extremely knowledgeable, professional and works hard for a positive outcome. He truly cares about his clients and manages to make the entire process less stressful for you. I highly recommend him!

I had the pleasure of working with Angela Walker at Blanchard & Walker, and I cannot recommend her highly enough. From the very beginning, Angela’s approach was both professional and personable. She took the time to understand my situation fully, ensuring I felt heard and supported every step of the way.

What truly stood out was how Angela made me feel confident and in control of my case, even during a challenging and uncertain time. She provided clear guidance and kept me well-informed, offering strategic insights that empowered me to make the best decisions. Her attention to detail and commitment to her clients is evident in everything she does. Angela has a remarkable ability to simplify complex legal matters, making them easier to understand while always prioritizing my best interests.

Blanchard & Walker’s reputation for excellence is well-earned, and I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone in need of legal services—especially in the realm of workplace law. Angela Walker’s expertise and dedication are second to none, and I’m incredibly grateful for her support. If you’re looking for a trusted legal partner, look no further than Angela and the team at Blanchard & Walker.

The attorneys at Blanchard & Walker are top notch.  Each and every interaction I have had with them has highlighted their breadth of knowledge, attention to detail and strategic thinking.  In my capacity as an attorney, I have sent a number of potential clients to Angela for representation in employment matters, and each has reported back how grateful they were for the referral.

Excellent, Very happy with their services.

I wanted to post this, because so many times people post negative things or complaints, and today I want to share a positive experience, thanks to Mr.David Blanchard and law firm.

During the COVID-19 Pandemic, hundreds of thousands were encouraged to apply for Unemployment Insurance, by media, our state government and Mr. Steven Gray (Director of UIA at the time).  My ex-wife applied, qualified, certified weekly, answered all questions honestly, UIA approved, and she received benefits.  Fast forward to today, she’s been asked to return all benefits received, thru no fault of her own.  COLLECTIONS had begun, on a person who hasn’t had even had a parking ticket, not a single criminal/civil/traffic incident in her entire life.

UIA determined OVERPAYMENT as the reason.  The COVID-19 qualifications, during a world wide Disaster, were forgotten about and only Pre-COVID UIA rules were applied to hers and many many others cases.

For over 2 years, there’s been no help from UIA
staff/management, UIA appeals, court, state government…  It appeared hopeless for my ex-wife and 100,000s’ of others in the same predicament.  Then a miracle took place on 12/22/2022, UIA announced a “Pause on Collections” (via email).  Come to find out, Mr. David Blanchard and his firm had filed a lawsuit against the State of Michigan Unemployment Insurance Agency.  A brilliant case was presented, resulting in wins on many issues and the resulting PAUSE on COLLECTIONS was issued by the courts.

On 1-10-2023, Mr. Blanchard returned my call from several days prior.   He took the time to explain the UIA pending lawsuit/appeal and listened patiently to details of my ex-wifes UIA case, offering his thoughts.  His Valuable Time and Wealth of Knowledge was Greatly Appreciated!

I don’t know if anyone actually reads this, but if you do I want to say THANK YOU.  You’ve given 100s of 1,000s, including my ex-wife something they haven’t had and that is “A VOICE“.  GOD Bless you Mr. Blanchard and Law Firm and Keep Up the Great Work!!!

P.S. - You made Santa''s "Good List"

This level of expertise immediately put me at ease, knowing that I had entrusted my case to highly competent professionals. Stephanie Mcpherson made the entire process seamless for me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Shana, for you kind words and thoughtful review. Stephanie, along with all of us here at CLAW, always put our clients before everything else, and we try to make sure our clints are with us every step of the way throughout the legal process and are feeling heard and comforted. We're happy to see this reflected in your review of us and our firm as a whole.

reviews.text: They were very communicative, proactive, and professional.

Joe Michaels is a lawyer that is very personable and understanding. He was passionate about my case and kept me well informed. I felt confident that my case was important to him. I was impressed with how my case was handled and the outcome. I highly recommend Mr. Michaels and this law firm.

Joseph Michaels represented in me in a somewhat aversarial deposition I gave related to a previous job.  He got up to speed on the very complex case quickly and did an excellent job preparing and representing me. He is smart and knowledgeable and a zealous advocate.  It gave me a lot of confidence to have him by on my side during this stressful proceeding. If I could give him 10 stars I would!

The best lawyer ever!!!!! Communication was amazing he fought extremely hard for me. My lawyer Adam believed in me and went above and beyond for what I des. Thank you so very much Adam for all your time , effort , and support. Also your hard work and dedication.

I highly recommend attorney Adam Taub. When other lawyers wouldn't take my case, Adam stepped in and advocated for me with relentless dedication. He isn't afraid to take on big corporations, and his tenacity and expertise truly shine in his work. Thanks to Adam's hard work and commitment, I felt supported and confident throughout the entire legal process. If you're looking for a lawyer who will fight for you against the odds, Adam Taub is the one to choose.
Great to work with! Highly professional, great communication, total integrity. Thank you for getting me the justice I deserved.
Good service and quick to get an appointment on the books!
CTM has always been reliable and responsive to all our needs!   They’re a great firm and we are happy, loyal clients.

During a recent employment challenge, I called Croson, Taub, and Michaels and was connected to Charlotte. She was wonderful to work with, being attentive, empathetic, and appreciative of my situation. Without the need to sign a formal representation document, she advised me quickly, clearly, and accurately about my legal rights and I was able to work through and overcome the challenge I was facing. Without any hesitation, I would recommend their services.
Charlotte and her team were able to settle my case quickly. I recieved more compensation than originally thought. Very happy with service. Very good communication with team as well.
Teri and Charlotte are AMAZING attorneys. I would recommend them to anyone who has employment issues. Thank you!

I have had the opportunity to utilize the legal services of Attorney Croson and her firm on multiple occasions over the last several years.  Attorney Croson has always been candid with me in her legal guidance provided even when it was not what I wanted to hear.  However, she has always been willing to support the advancement of my final decision on whatever issue that we were addressing. For the most part, I followed her guidance to make a final decision on the approach that we ended up taking to resolve my legal matter.  I very much appreciated Attorney Croson’s fair and reasonable approach to handling my legal matters that she efficiently facilitated resolving.  I would highly recommend Attorney Croson and her firm for your employment law needs.

We worked with Charlotte Croson for 3 years on a case against a city government. She and her team communicated well through the whole process. This was a long case, but she fought hard for us and didn't back down. She believed in me and that meant a lot! I want to personally thank her and her team for guiding, directing and encouraging us along the way. I would recommend her and her team to help you thoroughly from start to end.
Very professional and answered all of my questions and I had quite a few. So very happy and may use him again.

I recently engaged the services of Charlotte Croson from Croson, Taub, and Michaels, PLLC, and I am compelled to share my outstanding experience. Charlotte is the epitome of professionalism, blending a calm and approachable demeanor with a direct and no-nonsense approach that I found incredibly reassuring.

Charlotte's analytical prowess was evident from our first meeting, quickly cutting to the chase and laying out a clear and concise roadmap for my case. I particularly appreciated her blunt and straightforward communication style—there were no games, no exaggerations, and certainly none of the slimy salesman qualities one might fear in hiring a professional service.

Charlotte’s honesty shone through every interaction. She did not attempt to inflate my case or rack up unnecessary hours; instead, she focused on providing genuine, honest advice and strong advocacy. Her dedication to transparency made me feel well-informed and confident throughout the entirety of our collaboration.

Moreover, as a strong and assertive woman in law, Charlotte embodied the strength and trustworthiness I sought in representation. Her advocacy was empowering and reinforced my belief that I had a steadfast voice championing for my rights and interests.

Charlotte balanced her professionalism and calmness with a directness that cut through the complexities of the legal process, making my experience smooth and stress-free. She was a strong advocate who represented my interests with unwavering dedication and integrity.

In conclusion, if you are in search of a legal representative who is not only calm and professional but also direct, honest, and a strong advocate, I wholeheartedly recommend Charlotte Croson. Her exemplary approach ensures you feel valued, heard, and genuinely represented.

Joseph was excellent and very helpful. I would recommend this firm to anyone!
Thank you!!

It’s already an uncomfortable situation to need a lawyer, but the experience doesn’t have to be.

Joe Michaels offered a wonderful experience during such a difficult time in my life, he was always honest yet optimistic.

He was such a light during a very dark time. Because of his strong work ethic, spending countless hours on my case, I was able to finally have closure.

Thank you!

Ms. Croson was wonderful to work with.  Very straight forward and communicated well throughout my case.  I certainly hope I do not need her help in the future but I would absolutely hire her again to assist me with my legal needs.  Thank you for your help and compassion throughout my ordeal and for having my back.

I was recently represented by Joseph and it was a great experience. I had my reservations about working with lawyers due to fears of crazy cost or just overall lack of care. However, I was greatly surprised. He made the process very simple, he was very personable, honest and I felt that he had my best interest in mind. I would recommend anyone to work with Joseph and will surely do so if ever needed in the future.

All the best,
Li
Really great experience with this firm.  I was kept in the loop and my attorney gave me the right mix of advice and autonomy.  Extremely knowledgeable, prepared, and effective.  Highly recommend.
Great representation with superb legal knowledge.

I met with Ms. Croson who was helpful, kind and explained things very well.
I would definitely see her again if necessary.

Joe Michaels is am excellent labor lawyer who won our union a fair contract against all odds. He is tenacious, knowledgeable, and committed to getting just outcomes for his clients. His background as a union organizer is a real complement to his expertise in labor law. If you find yourself in a David vs Goliath situation, then you need Joe.

Joseph represented the EMU faculty in its 2022 contract negotiations. His knowledge of the law and skillful tactical and strategic decisions were indispensable in our fight. He worked with us, empowering us to make our demands heard in the negotiating room and beyond. The resulting contract was the best EMU faculty secured in more than a decade.

Adam Taub also worked with us, albeit only on specific issues. His insights and arguments contributed to our successes as well, particularly on FMLA-related provisions.

I cannot recommend Crosson, Taub and Michaels highly enough. I fully expect we will ask for their representation in our next contract negotiation.
Joe Michaels and Co. fought like Hell to get over 500 faculty a fair contract. Amazing work!

I know my case was not easy because I went through several attorneys before I was finally referred to Mr. Michaels. I was especially impressed how he actually heard me. He understood my feelings regarding my situation.  Thankfully he had the knowledge, experience and confidence to take on my case. He thoughtfully represented me with honesty, firmness, and respect. Mr. Michaels turned a unpleasant situation into a positive experience which allowed me to move forward. I’m extremely grateful!

We are so thankful to Charlotte and her team for helping us successfully navigate a challenging civil lawsuit.  She talked us through every step and worked diligently to uncover vital information that even we weren't aware of to support our claims.  Charlotte is patient, kind, and client focused and she truly wants what is best for you-but she is also a fighter.  She won't give up until you have what you deserve.  She is supportive and was the best advocate we could have asked for.  We are beyond thankful for Charlotte and her team and would highly recommend them to anyone considering civil litigation.
Joseph Michaels was a fantastic lawyer who helped manage everything during a really stressful time, even going above and beyond after case was finished! I would highly recommend to anyone.

I made the right decision in choosing this firm and its team of lawyers. When I could not find anyone to help us, including the EEOC, Teri and Charlotte took on my case. They introduced and educated us, my husband and I, in the steps, levels, and process of going to court and taking on a Goliath. There were times when a strong personality and honest clarity was needed, but they were also understanding, compassionate and comforting when I felt the pressure and stress of fighting for what we all believe was a dishonest action taken against me, an induvial with a disability who truly enjoyed performing their job. They made sure to involve me in everything involving my case, they let me know what my options and what may be best for me without trying to influence or persuade me into a decision I wasn’t comfortable with. Their priority was me, their client, not what the payoff could be. In my opinion, we beat Goliath because, even though money was never the issue, the settlement we agreed upon hit them where it hurts the most, their pocketbooks and that they now have a history of a wrongful discrimination action. Thank you, Charlotte and Teri! E .Garcia

Joseph Michaels was extremely thorough and diligent in handling my First Amendment case. He was aggressive, knowledgeable and offered great solutions, and listened to my interests in what I wanted as a result in the case. He was very detailed and attentive, and always available to talk. It was an overall great experience working with him.
Professional representation, phenomenal law pedigree. I recommend Croson, Taub, & Michaels at the highest level.

I have had the great pleasure to work with Croson, Taub, and Michaels, PLLC. Especially with Joseph Michaels. If I was able to give more than 5 stars, I would. Mr. Michaels has worked very hard for me to obtain my settlement. He was honest, straightforward and there were no surprises down the road. The firm work non-stop to keep the process moving with difficulties from the opposition. They were also very understanding and caring, knowing this was an emotional situation for me. But what sold me is that Joseph Michaels stood his ground and didn’t allow us to be pushed around. Something the opposition was not use to. If I ever need representation again, I will always turn to Croson, Taub, and Michaels.

I was represented by Joseph Michaels in a lawsuit against the State of Michigan after they retaliated against me for my First Amendment rights. Joe litigated the case aggressively. The State tried to dismiss the case twice, but Joe beat them in Court both times.  Ultimately, I settled the case for a six-figure amount, which I was very pleased with. I would recommend Joe to anyone whose rights have been violated at work. Joe is responsive, knowledgeable, and most importantly, a bulldog in the Courtroom.

Was a very good experience, case was handle with great success and my attorney Charlotte Croson was very talented and aggressive when needed she was very good on keeping me up to date with changes and very helpful in answering all my questions and any changes. I was very pleased with how she handled and settled my case. I was thankful to have her reresenting me.

Allen Green III

Mr. Taub was extremely professional and helpful. Even though there was no chance that he would earn a large sum of money from my case, he still treated it very seriously and invested a significant amount of time into researching the matter and advising me. He made me feel that he cared about me receiving justice, and worked diligently to that end. I strongly recommend calling Mr. Taub for any legal matter he is qualified to handle.

I can’t express enough, my gratitude and good fortune to have found and then be represented by Croson, Taub and Michaels in an FMLA lawsuit against my former employer, when other, larger firms refused to take my case. Adam and Charlotte were steadfast in their belief in me and my case and ultimately prevailed against my former employer and their high powered law firm at summary judgment. I am extremely pleased with their  level of service, communication, counseling, and feedback. I recommend them highly, especially for employment related matters such as mine. To paraphrase an old saying “it’s not the size of the firm in the fight that matters, but rather the size of the fight in the firm. “ These guys are fighters!

Adam Taub represented me in a diligent manner. He did a great job at remaining in contact with me and inquiring with me as to what I would prefer before making any decisions. He was respectful and thorough. He was also very knowledgeable and informative. I would recommend this law firm.

Charlotte Croson is a real go-getter! Highly responsive and thorough. I felt she had my best interest and quickly earned my respect and trust. She did an amazing job for me. I highly recommend Charlotte Croson without any reservation!

Charlotte Croson is the kind of warrior that you want on your side if you need to fight. She carries an arsenal of weapons like intelligence Integrity experience and honor. With true compassion she will fight for what is right you cannot go wrong with her on your side. Thank you Charlotte. Semper Fi

Adam is a fantastic attorney and an honest, calming force for any matters of employment law. He assisted me with a legal matter that was time-sensitive, and produced results quickly, accurately, and efficiently. He also charged me a very reasonable rate for the work; it was significantly less than I thought it would be. Five stars, because six isn't an option.
A lawyer at this firm reviewed an employment agreement I had. Their office gave me great advice! Thanks guys!

I was represented by a partner at Croson, Taub, & Michaels and am very happy with the representation I received. They provided fantastic expertise and advice and were there for me every step of the way.

Bryan and his team were tremendously helpful in guiding me through a painful, stressful and difficult process. He was very patient and did a great job of explaining things to me and alleviating my anxiety, and handled my case well in all aspects. I have no regrets in my decision to work with this firm, and I highly recommend them to any other area cyclists who find themselves in need of legal help.

After I had a crash on my bicycle involving a delivery van, Bryan Waldman represented me. I can't imagine a better advocate. As I was totally inexperienced with legal matters, I needed someone who could walk me through the lengthy process. At every stage, I trusted Bryan and knew he was fighting for me. Bryan is friendly and reassuring which is what I needed during this often difficult time. When my case was settled, I was very happy with the outcome. He has my highest recommendation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful review. We're truly grateful you entrusted Bryan Waldman to guide you through such a challenging time. We understand how overwhelming legal matters can be, especially after a traumatic experience, and we're glad Bryan could provide both the advocacy and reassurance you needed. Your satisfaction with the outcome means the world to us. Wishing you continued healing and all the best ahead — and thank you again for your highest recommendation!

reviews.text: Bryan Waldman is well-known in the local cyclist community for being a highly skilled and experienced bike law attorney. It was a pleasure to work with him, Max Waldman, and the wider Sinas Dramis team after my crash last year. They work hard and get results. I highly recommend them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your recommendation! Your trust in our firm means a great deal to us, and we're honored to be part of Michigan's cycling community. Wishing you safe riding ahead!

reviews.text: I like Bruce. He got me approved for Social Security and he's about to get me Workers Compensation from the State of Michigan. His people are great too. Shout out to Sandy!
Bruce did a really amazing job for me. He worked hard to gather all necessary information and ultimately won my case. So grateful 🙏

Bruce Weider did a awesome job for me. And another friend of mine that referred me to him. I really like the way he runs his practice and him as a person. Great sense of humor and doesn't take the case if he doesn't think you have a winable case. Takes the time to answer your questions and concerns if you have any. I will refer him to anyone that asks me if I know a good attorney for there disability or SSI claims. I'm going to tell them hay I know a guy. I also like how Bruce is not going to waste or take up a bunch of your time talking about nothing. He's going to talk straight  up you this is what I need from you as far as paperwork records that are part of your claim.Then in the event that you win your case. He will take the time to explain what happens next. If you're lucky like I was he only did my appeal. but luckily I won with out going in front of a judge.
Great guy, very informative and knowledgeable. He was able to direct us in the right for we needed.

We are incredibly grateful to Bruce, Sandy, and the entire office for their outstanding work on the case. From start to finish, the team was professional, communicative, and supportive.

Bruce consistently looked out for our best interests and guided us with honesty, experience, and care, which made a difficult process much easier. Sandy was exceptionally kind, patient, and supportive throughout, and her warmth truly meant a lot to us.

Thank you to everyone involved for your hard work and dedication—you cant ask for a better team.

Bruce gets two stars from me and that Is the best I can do. I was very disappointed with the service I received and would not recommend Bruce to handle any work comp case unless you have a “smoking gun” so to speak. Very unprepared I had to supply much information 2, 3 and four times and this was lengthy information that I had listed multiple times even in chronological order. Bruce was not clear, concise or organized. Neither my disability, nor my work comp were settled anything close to what he had told me in the beginning and even til midway through the case. He lost the Disability case, and we were at the bottom of the pole on the work comp case, even though I ended up with an injury that is not curable. I received excuse after excuse after excuse, Often times the only answer I received was “ What do you want me to do about it?” And at times he stated we can take this to court, but we will probably lose. In the end, I ended up having to communicate with his wife, who Is his assistant when he needs it.This was much better than dealing with Bruce as he is very hyperactive and really doesn’t let you speak to get a word out. It was a constant uphill battle. I am surprised to see a 4.9 rating on this website. I believe that Bruce takes on more than he can handle leaving him spread too thin for the cases he has. I am definitely disappointed in the outcome and the only reason he got two stars is because I truly believe Bruce is a nice person but nice people don’t win cases.In my opinion,He is not well spoken in court. I am not writing this review as backlash, I am writing it in hopes that someone May read it and that it will help. If you don’t have a case that is a “guaranteed win” I would not recommend this attorney.

Disappointed but moving on!!!!
I highly recommend Bruce L. Weider to handle your disability case. My case was not the easiest to handle, but he did his research and knew exactly  how to handle it. It paid off because we won.

Bruce Weider is very good at what he does! Be patient with him, he has a good heart and he won my case. He’s very attentive and he is very serious about his work. He always responds as well, so it’s never a time you’ll be left on a hanger or disappointed. Thank you Mr. Weider - Monica Montgomery
reviews.ownerResponse: Monica, Thank you so much for your kind and heartfelt review.  It was such a pleasure working with you.  We are so happy we could help you with your case.

reviews.text:
I cannot recommend attorney Bruce Weider enough. He was absolutely exceptional in handling my Social Security Disability case. From the start, his knowledge of the law and the process gave me confidence, and when it came time for court, he showed exactly why he’s the best—he asked a question that completely shifted the momentum in my favor. Because of his skill, I didn’t just win—I won the maximum amount possible.

His office staff deserves just as much praise. The ladies in the office were incredible—friendly, professional, and always willing to help. Every time I called or stopped in, I was treated with kindness and respect.

Overall, my experience was nothing short of outstanding. Bruce and his team went above and beyond for me, and I am truly grateful. If you need someone who will fight for you and knows exactly how to win these cases, Bruce Weider is the attorney you want.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing this! We’re really glad we could help with your Social Security Disability case, and it means a lot to know you felt supported by Bruce and the team.

reviews.text: Bruce took one of the toughest and scariest times in my life, and walked me through it like I couldn’t even began to put into words on here. If you're EVER in need of anything disability related, please do yourself a huge favor and don’t call anyone but him. His knowledge and experience is unmatched and his office staff Sandy and Erin are beyond perfection. Truly an amazing experience!!!!⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for such an amazing review! We know how stressful the disability process can be, and we’re so glad Bruce, Sandy, and Erin were able to make things easier for you. Your kind words mean a lot to all of us!

reviews.text:
I had been struggling with disability for years and had lawyers not even try to listen to me on initial interactions.  I had given up more than once, but then just happened to come across Bruce through a Google search and I was so glad I did!
I can honestly say he fought for me.  He was thorough, informative, reassuring (through all my stress), and it was a pleasure to work with him.
And a big shout out to Sandy as well, who was just as on top of things and kept accurate communications.
reviews.ownerResponse: Andi,  we are so grateful you didn’t give up and that you found your way to us. Thank you for trusting us to be part of your disability journey.

reviews.text: Bruce and his office were amazing to work with.  I had a very difficult SSDI case but Bruce got it done for me like a Rockstar!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: We truly appreciate your feedback and are thrilled we could support you through a challenging case. Thank you!

reviews.text:
Had a consultation
I was upset and he kept asking if I had mental issues ..
Kept saying oh this is this you are the workmen comp
Just didn't listen to me at all
.
.
The repeating of do you have mental issues Was super unprofessional!!
reviews.ownerResponse: While we take all concerns seriously, the consultation process described does not align with the way we conduct our evaluations. We are unable to locate any record of a consultation under this name, and it appears this review may not be from someone who has been evaluated by our office. Please understand that eligibility for disability or workers' compensation often requires us to ask standardized questions that may feel personal, but these are a necessary part of the process.

reviews.text: Bruce and the people who work in his office are very knowledgeable and determined to help disabled people win their cases. I am so glad I chose him to represent me. 10/10, would highly recommend!
Awesome attorney with an awesome office staff.  I am beyond grateful for the hard work and representation I received from Bruce and his staff.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Keith, It was an absolute pleasure working with you. Wishing you the best of luck. Please reach out if you need anything in the future!

Bruce and the entire team

My marriage based green card took 7 months from the day of submitting petitions to receiving my green card in my mail. Many thanks to Attorney Rebecca Carcagno. Rebecca was very thorough with our case and this made it move so smooth and fast. She did Concurrent filling, our i -130, i-765,i-485 and i-131 petitions were submitted and received by the USCIS on the 21st May 2024, In June i was scheduled for biometrics and received my SSN and EAD the same month. In September we received a RFIE. Rebecca was very thorough when it came to submitting evidence , she guided us through each and every evidence to be submitted , made reviews and guided to make sure the right documents are submitted. We submitted our RFIE the last week of November, that tells you how much she was committed and took time to make sure we had the right response. In Dec 5th 2024 we received I-131 approval (travel parole). On Dec 17th 2024 I-130 and I -485 were approved . On 20th Dec 2024 my marriage based green card was produced and shipped vial USPS and on the 24th December I had my green card and that is how i celebrated my 2024 Christmas. Rebecca is so detailed, she responds to every call, email and texts .She kept track of our case and kept us informed at every step. I have NEVER worked with such a professional and committed person. reviews.ownerResponse: It is interesting that you are not using your real name.  Ebony, you did not make the required payments in your chapter 13 plan, I got you more time to do so but the Trustee required that you make the payments that you promised to do so when you filed your case.  When you indicated that you were not able to do so, I let you know what would happen if your case was dismissed.  Luckily, you then made the required payment which I am sure you would not have done if I had not given you an honest assessment of your case.  The landlord's attorney never contacted me.  I did offer you many options to make your case work and you indicated that you had no time to discuss these options.  I am glad that you have found a new attorney that you feel comfortable with and I wish you the best of luck.

reviews.text: I went to them to help with my debt. I wasnt sure if I should even start filing, as I am a single parent with low income. Michelle told me they could work with me. reviews.ownerResponse:
If a person is unable to make the plan payments, then a case does get dismissed if the plan is not able to be modified. You have 100% access to all payments made and disbursed through the NDC system. I do not know who you are based on your screen name, but I invite you to reach out to me personally and I will help to make sure you get the payment receipts you are looking for.
Tricia Terry

I was facing two serious charges that could have a major affect on my life. An unfair situation to which I had a lawyer tell me they would eat me alive and I'd lose and go to jail. He told me that he would like to look into my case and give me a fighting chance. I am BEYOND thankful I am so glad he decided to take a chance on me! not only am I able to be worry free about keeping my job but I still have a shot at life!  I'm so relieved. He is attentive and communicates extremely well.  You don't have to worry about what's going on with your case because that line of communication is always open. Someone who will give you that fighting chance because its your life we are talking about.

Multiple lawyers my family talked to didn’t even want to take my case because it seemed too difficult and they didn’t want to bother trying, but Alex was completely willing to help and said he was up for the challenge. He worked closely with my family and I and truly put his best foot forward. After all his hard work he was able to help me win my case and bring peace to my mind. He was definitely a blessing from God and my family and I are so grateful for all his help and hard work and I definitely recommend him!

Alexander Hermanowski was incredibly professional and helpful. He made a stressful situation extremely manageable and painless. I cannot recommend Jonathan Paul highly enough. I reached out to him one night when I needed help. I called him on a whim, left a voicemail, and he texted back a few minutes later: “I’m actually heading to bed send me an email and I’ll reply in the morning. Everything is going to be ok.” That’s the kind of guy he is. By morning, he had a plan and was ready to help.

He listened to everything I said, understood where I was coming from, and built out a strategy that worked. He’s detail-oriented and really thinks through the details. He adjusted things as we went, and when it came time to move forward, he knew exactly what to do. The whole thing came together smoothly. He resolved everything completely.

What I appreciated most was his honesty. He told me upfront he’s selective about who he works with. He charges one flat fee with no hidden costs. He actually cares about the people he represents, not just the billable hours. He was straight with me from day one. Jonathan delivers results. If you’re looking for an attorney who knows his stuff and actually cares, he’s it. At the end of everything, he gave me a hug and told me to keep in touch. I didn’t know attorneys like him existed. He genuinely cares about his clients. Highly recommend.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Joe, thank you for sharing this. I remember our email exchange, and I’m truly sorry if my initial response didn’t feel as supportive as you needed in that moment. I was multitasking during a family obligation for my son and tried to respond quickly so you wouldn’t be left waiting. In hindsight, I should have suggested a brief call instead of sending a fast reply.

My intention both in that first message and in the follow-up emails was to help you sort through what happened and get to the heart of the issue so you could understand your options, and to likely address the issue without having to hire an attorney. I hope the information and guidance I offered was helpful in some way; I never want anyone to walk away feeling discouraged.

Compassion and patience are at the center of how I work with people, and I’m sorry if that wasn’t clear in our initial interaction. If you ever want to continue the conversation or need guidance moving forward, I’m here and happy to help. I truly wish you the best.

reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text: Our family had no idea what we were in for.. Bassett Murray Law Group was recommended to us by several nursing/senior Homes as we were in a panic search for a good facility. reviews.text:
********Please read in its entirety********

I’ve been in a custody battle off and on for nearly 9 years.

Recently, I had 2 trial dates set for an evidentiary hearing. During my 2 day trial, 2 more additional trial dates were added. My attorney (at that time) and I had differences of opinions. I was faced with a decision to either proceed with current counsel or look for new representation IN THE MIDDLE OF AN EVIDENTIARY HEARING!!!

I was then referred to Penny and Keith at KGP LAW. I cannot scream this from the rooftops loud enough, PENNY AND HER ENTIRE STAFF ARE FABULOUS! Penny agreed to take on my case without hesitation. Penny had the daunting task of learning all the facts from nearly a 9 year custody battle IN 2 WEEKS TIME! Finding an experienced attorney to represent me in the middle of trial was a hard task in itself. THEN, finding an attorney to learn a case in 2 weeks and become passionate about it, that seemed impossible, until I met Penny.

Penny Parker not only learned my case inside and out, she cared. It felt as if Penny was with me since day 1. Penny is the type of person that you meet and you feel as if you have known her forever. She is such a sweet, genuine, caring and compassionate person. Penny not only had to get up to speed regarding my case in less than 2 weeks, but she also took the time to learn about me and my family on a personal level. I never felt rushed and she always took the time to listen. Penny is a genius and knows the LAW and is VERY respected by the courts. Walking into court, I had a huge sense of relief. I felt safe with Penny.

Penny, Keith, Susan, Whitney and anyone at KPG LAW that had a hand in helping me protect my son, I thank you so much for everything.

If you’re looking into a family attorney, I absolutely recommend Penny AND KGP LAW! You will not regret it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Lisa, thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience with such sincerity and detail. Your words truly mean the world to us, and it’s incredibly rewarding to know that Penny and the KGP Law team were able to provide you with the support and care you needed during such a difficult and emotional time. We understand how overwhelming a custody battle can be, especially one that spans nearly a decade. It’s clients like you who remind us why we are so passionate about what we do.

It’s humbling to hear how much Penny’s dedication and compassion impacted you, and your trust in her, especially under such challenging circumstances, is a testament to her commitment to her clients. We are so glad that you felt safe, heard, and supported throughout the process. Your kind words about our team mean so much, and we’re thrilled that you felt like part of the family.

We will continue to be here for you and your family whenever you need us, and thank you again for your heartfelt recommendation. We wish you and your son all the best moving forward!

reviews.text: In my time of need, I was referred to this wonderful family of attorneys. I don’t know where to start with all of the good things I have to say about KGP. It was a family matter My brother David B  did not Go by my mother's will and wishes... Evidently he thought ahead and put his name on all my mother's assets which entitles him to her assets that were supposed to be split three ways. That did not happen! The law office did get my mother's bank accounts so I could see every transaction and I did  write down to $250 in salmon . Retaining a lawyer please make sure you make it clear what you're looking to do.

reviews.text:
A friend's corporate/business lawyer recommended Muth Law to me. It was an answer to my prayers!

Working with Ben is like working with a very knowledgeable and trusted friend. He is very experienced in personal injury law, yet humble, honest, and approachable.

Ben guided and supported me through the entire process. He listened, answered all of my questions, and included me in important case decisions.

I am so grateful to Ben, Jennifer, Chris, Elizabeth, and Ella for the successful outcome of my case! They are a professional, friendly, and talented team who treated me and my family with kindness and respect.

I highly recommend Muth Law!

Working with Muth Law was a truly positive experience. From day one, Ben showed a deep knowledge of injury law and a genuine commitment to my recovery. They communicated clearly, guided me through every step, and made sure I understood my rights and options. Thanks to their diligence and negotiation skills, we achieved an outcome that exceeded my expectations. I would confidently recommend them to anyone facing an injury claim.
Muth Law did a fantastic job on our case! Everyone in the office showed compassion, and gave us explanations along the way. Ben and his team went above and beyond! Thank you again!

I couldn’t be more grateful for the incredible work Muth Law Team did on my dog bite case. From our very first consultation,  Ben Muth was professional, compassionate, and thorough in explaining every step of the legal process.

Throughout the case, he kept me informed, answered all my questions promptly, and made a stressful situation so much easier to handle. Thanks to his compassion I felt heard the whole time and thanks to his expertise, we won the case — and I finally feel a sense of justice and closure.

I highly recommend Ben Muth to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, caring, and determined attorney. Truly top-notch service from start to finish!

Muth Laws Team did an exceptional job with helping my mother settle her personal injury claim. They are  always very pleasant to speak with. The team is very quick to answer your questions and concerns. I am very impressed with their dedication in settling her case in a very professional and caring manner. They are a wonderful team.  If anyone ever needs a personal injury lawyer Ben Muth and his team are exceptional.
Thank you for your dedication and amazing service.

With Much Gratitude
Tanja
Great experience with Muth Law! They were very responsive, super helpful, and great people!

Recommend READING BEFORE signing with Ben Muth:

I am an injured client of Ben’s in the past and I was treated terribly throughout my experiences working with his firm. I DO NOT recommend Ben and his firm for the following reasons:

1. Ben disrespected and yelled at me over the phone with extremely rude remarks despite being injured and vulnerable. He sent me a follow up email that Chat GPT wrote, which was incredibly insincere just to cover his bases.
2. His entire staff quit overtime, he had over 4 paralegals work for him over their course of the 2 years I was there. Some employee’s expressed Ben reading through their private emails.
3. Ben would downplay the severity of my injuries and the impacts the car accident had on me.
4. His previous staff assistants talked badly about him to my face and shared horrific stories of him as a boss, behind his back.
5. Haley (who was phenomenal) left the firm, and Ben took over my case jeopardizing the financial outcome and delayed the timeline significantly.
6. Ben and his staff made significant errors on paperwork and address files delaying my case verdict even further.
7. Ben asks people, who ARE NOT CLIENTS to write reviews about his firm. Seems pretty slimy if you ask me.

For these reasons and more, I highly recommend looking elsewhere for a more experienced, empathetic, and kind personal injury lawyer. If I had been informed of my options to seek different lawyer support, I would have. Don’t make the same mistakes I made…
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Hadas, I'm sorry to hear that you had such a negative interaction with Muth Law. We take all feedback seriously and strive to provide respectful, responsive, and competent representation to every client. While I can't discuss the specifics of your case due to confidentiality, I'd like to clarify that we are constantly working to improve our service, and feedback like yours helps us do just that. We were thrilled to get you a great result for your claim, after a multi-year litigation with multiple Defendants. Lawsuits are taxing on our clients and staff, and we take your feedback seriously so that we can improve. We wish you the best of luck in all of your future endeavors!
